975	    def list_events(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
976	        return self.event_log.list_events()
977	
978	    def list_active_facts(self, property_id: str | None = None) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
979	        active_keys = self.list_active_keys(property_id=property_id)
980	        return self._facts_for_projection(active_keys)
981	
982	    def list_active_facts_by_section(
983	        self,
984	        property_id: str,
985	        section: str,
986	    ) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
987	        active_keys = self.list_active_keys(property_id=property_id, section=section)
988	        return self._facts_for_projection(active_keys)
989	
990	    def list_active_facts_as_of(
991	        self,
992	        property_id: str,
993	        as_of: datetime,
994	        *,
995	        section: str | None = None,
996	        time_axis: str = "transaction",
997	    ) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
998	        _ensure_transaction_time_axis(time_axis)
999	        active_keys = self.replay_active_projection(
1000	            as_of=_normalize_datetime(as_of),
1001	            property_id=property_id,
1002	            section=section,
1003	        )
1004	        return self._facts_for_projection(active_keys)
1005	
1006	    def _facts_for_projection(
1007	        self,
1008	        active_keys: list[dict[str, object]],
1009	    ) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
1010	        facts: list[dict[str, object]] = []
1011	        for active_key in active_keys:
1012	            fact = self.fetch_fact(str(active_key["fact_id"]))
1013	            if fact is None:
1014	                continue
1015	            fact["current_status"] = "active"
1016	            fact["activated_event_id"] = active_key["activated_event_id"]
1017	            facts.append(fact)
1018	        return facts
1019	
1020	    def list_active_keys(
1021	        self,
1022	        *,
1023	        property_id: str | None = None,
1024	        section: str | None = None,
1025	    ) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
1026	        if property_id is not None and section is not None:
1027	            rows = self._conn.execute(
1028	                """
1029	                SELECT property_id, section, key, fact_id, activated_event_id
1030	                FROM active_fact_keys
1031	                WHERE property_id = ? AND section = ?
1032	                ORDER BY property_id, section, key
1033	                """,
1034	                [property_id, section],
1035	            ).fetchall()
1036	        elif property_id is not None:
1037	            rows = self._conn.execute(
1038	                """
1039	                SELECT property_id, section, key, fact_id, activated_event_id
1040	                FROM active_fact_keys
1041	                WHERE property_id = ?
1042	                ORDER BY property_id, section, key
1043	                """,
1044	                [property_id],
1045	            ).fetchall()
1046	        elif section is not None:
1047	            rows = self._conn.execute(
1048	                """
1049	                SELECT property_id, section, key, fact_id, activated_event_id
1050	                FROM active_fact_keys
1051	                WHERE section = ?
1052	                ORDER BY property_id, section, key
1053	                """,
1054	                [section],
1055	            ).fetchall()
1056	        else:
1057	            rows = self._conn.execute(
1058	                """
1059	                SELECT property_id, section, key, fact_id, activated_event_id
1060	                FROM active_fact_keys
1061	                ORDER BY property_id, section, key
1062	                """,
1063	            ).fetchall()
1064	        return [key for key in (_row_to_dict(_ACTIVE_KEY_COLUMNS, row) for row in rows) if key]
1065	
1066	    def fetch_active_key(
1067	        self,
1068	        property_id: str,
1069	        section: str,
1070	        key: str,
1071	    ) -> dict[str, object] | None:
1072	        row = self._conn.execute(
1073	            """
1074	            SELECT property_id, section, key, fact_id, activated_event_id
1075	            FROM active_fact_keys
1076	            WHERE property_id = ? AND section = ? AND key = ?
1077	            """,
1078	            [property_id, section, key],
1079	        ).fetchone()
1080	        return _row_to_dict(_ACTIVE_KEY_COLUMNS, row)
1081	
1082	    def replay_active_projection(
1083	        self,
1084	        *,
1085	        as_of: datetime | None = None,
1086	        property_id: str | None = None,
1087	        section: str | None = None,
1088	    ) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
1089	        normalized_as_of = _normalize_datetime(as_of)
1090	        facts_by_id = self._facts_by_id_for_replay(normalized_as_of)
1091	        asserted_event_ids = self._asserted_event_ids(normalized_as_of)
1092	        active_by_key = self._seed_active_projection(facts_by_id, asserted_event_ids)
1093	
1094	        for event in self._events_for_replay(normalized_as_of):
1095	            self._apply_projection_event(event, facts_by_id, active_by_key)
1096	
1097	        rows = [
1098	            {
1099	                "property_id": key[0],
1100	                "section": key[1],
1101	                "key": key[2],
1102	                "fact_id": fact_id,
1103	                "activated_event_id": activated_event_id,
1104	            }
1105	            for key, (fact_id, activated_event_id) in active_by_key.items()
1106	            if (property_id is None or key[0] == property_id)
1107	            and (section is None or key[1] == section)
1108	        ]
1109	        return sorted(rows, key=lambda row: (row["property_id"], row["section"], row["key"]))
1110	
1111	    def rebuild_active_projection(self) -> None:
1112	        active_keys = self.replay_active_projection()
1113	        self._conn.execute("BEGIN TRANSACTION")
1114	        try:
1115	            self._conn.execute("DELETE FROM active_fact_keys")
1116	            for active_key in active_keys:
1117	                self._conn.execute(
1118	                    """
1119	                    INSERT INTO active_fact_keys (
1120	                        property_id,
1121	                        section,
1122	                        key,
1123	                        fact_id,
1124	                        activated_event_id
1125	                    )
1126	                    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
1127	                    """,
1128	                    [active_key[column] for column in _ACTIVE_KEY_COLUMNS],
1129	                )
1130	            self._conn.execute("COMMIT")
1131	        except Exception:
1132	            self._conn.execute("ROLLBACK")
1133	            raise
1134	
1135	    def _facts_by_id_for_replay(
1136	        self,
1137	        as_of: datetime | None,
1138	    ) -> dict[str, dict[str, object]]:
1139	        if as_of is None:
1140	            rows = self._conn.execute(
1141	                f"{_FACT_SELECT_SQL} ORDER BY asserted_at, fact_id"
1142	            ).fetchall()
1143	        else:
1144	            rows = self._conn.execute(
1145	                f"""
1146	                {_FACT_SELECT_SQL}
1147	                WHERE asserted_at <= ?
1148	                ORDER BY asserted_at, fact_id
1149	                """,
1150	                [as_of],
1151	            ).fetchall()
1152	        facts = [_row_to_dict(_FACT_STORAGE_COLUMNS, row) for row in rows]
1153	        return {str(fact["fact_id"]): fact for fact in facts if fact is not None}
1154	
1155	    def _events_for_replay(self, as_of: datetime | None) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
1156	        if as_of is None:
1157	            events = self.list_events()
1158	        else:
1159	            rows = self._conn.execute(
1160	                f"""
1161	                {_EVENT_SELECT_SQL}
1162	                WHERE occurred_at <= ?
1163	                """,
1164	                [as_of],
1165	            ).fetchall()
1166	            events = [event for event in (_row_to_event(row) for row in rows) if event is not None]
1167	        return sorted(events, key=_event_replay_key)
1168	
1169	    def _asserted_event_ids(self, as_of: datetime | None) -> dict[str, str]:
1170	        asserted_event_ids: dict[str, str] = {}
1171	        for event in self._events_for_replay(as_of):
1172	            if event["kind"] != "fact.asserted":
1173	                continue
1174	            fact_id = _event_ref(event, "fact_id", "fact_id")
1175	            if fact_id is not None:
1176	                asserted_event_ids[fact_id] = str(event["event_id"])
1177	        return asserted_event_ids
1178	
1179	    def _seed_active_projection(
1180	        self,
1181	        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
1182	        asserted_event_ids: Mapping[str, str],
1183	    ) -> dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]]:
1184	        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]] = {}
1185	        for fact_id, fact in facts_by_id.items():
1186	            if fact["status"] != "active":
1187	                continue
1188	            active_by_key[_fact_key(fact)] = (
1189	                fact_id,
1190	                asserted_event_ids.get(fact_id, f"asserted:{fact_id}"),
1191	            )
1192	        return active_by_key
1193	
1194	    def _apply_projection_event(
1195	        self,
1196	        event: Mapping[str, object],
1197	        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
1198	        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]],
1199	    ) -> None:
1200	        kind = event["kind"]
1201	        if kind == "fact.asserted":
1202	            self._apply_asserted_event(event, facts_by_id, active_by_key)
1203	        elif kind == "fact.activated":
1204	            self._activate_projection_fact(event, facts_by_id, active_by_key)
1205	        elif kind == "fact.superseded":
1206	            self._apply_superseded_event(event, facts_by_id, active_by_key)
1207	        elif kind == "fact.rejected":
1208	            fact_id = _event_ref(event, "fact_id", "fact_id")
1209	            if fact_id is not None:
1210	                self._remove_projection_fact(fact_id, facts_by_id, active_by_key)
1211	
1212	    def _apply_asserted_event(
1213	        self,
1214	        event: Mapping[str, object],
1215	        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
1216	        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]],
1217	    ) -> None:
1218	        fact_id = _event_ref(event, "fact_id", "fact_id")
1219	        if fact_id is None:
1220	            return
1221	        fact = facts_by_id.get(fact_id)
1222	        if fact is not None and fact["status"] == "active":
1223	            active_by_key[_fact_key(fact)] = (fact_id, str(event["event_id"]))
1224	
1225	    def _activate_projection_fact(
1226	        self,
1227	        event: Mapping[str, object],
1228	        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
1229	        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]],
1230	    ) -> None:
1231	        fact_id = _event_ref(event, "fact_id", "fact_id")
1232	        if fact_id is None:
1233	            return
1234	        fact = facts_by_id.get(fact_id)
1235	        if fact is not None and fact["status"] != "rejected":
1236	            active_by_key[_fact_key(fact)] = (fact_id, str(event["event_id"]))
1237	
1238	    def _apply_superseded_event(
1239	        self,
1240	        event: Mapping[str, object],
1241	        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
1242	        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]],
1243	    ) -> None:
1244	        old_fact_id = _event_ref(event, "old_fact_id", "old_fact_id")
1245	        if old_fact_id is not None:
1246	            self._remove_projection_fact(old_fact_id, facts_by_id, active_by_key)
1247	
1248	        new_fact_id = _event_ref(event, "fact_id", "new_fact_id")
1249	        if new_fact_id is None:
1250	            return
1251	        new_fact = facts_by_id.get(new_fact_id)
1252	        if new_fact is not None and new_fact["status"] != "rejected":
1253	            active_by_key[_fact_key(new_fact)] = (new_fact_id, str(event["event_id"]))
1254	
1255	    def _remove_projection_fact(
1256	        self,
1257	        fact_id: str,
1258	        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
1259	        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]],
1260	    ) -> None:

1262	        if fact is None:
1263	            return
1264	        key = _fact_key(fact)
1265	        if active_by_key.get(key, (None, None))[0] == fact_id:
1266	            del active_by_key[key]

1268	
1269	def open_facts(db_path: Path) -> FactsStore:

from __future__ import annotations

import json
from collections.abc import Mapping
from datetime import UTC, datetime
from pathlib import Path
from uuid import uuid4

import duckdb

from app.storage.db import connect

_FACT_STATUS: frozenset[str] = frozenset({"active", "pending", "rejected"})

_FACT_STORAGE_COLUMNS: tuple[str, ...] = (
    "fact_id",
    "property_id",
    "section",
    "key",
    "value_json",
    "status",
    "supersedes_fact_id",
    "asserted_at",
    "valid_from",
    "valid_to",
    "source_id",
    "source_kind",
    "source_locator",
    "source_excerpt",
    "source_timestamp",
    "content_hash",
    "extractor",
    "confidence",
    "review_hint",
    "idempotency_key",
)

_EVENT_STORAGE_COLUMNS: tuple[str, ...] = (
    "event_id",
    "occurred_at",
    "kind",
    "payload_json",
    "actor",
    "fact_id",
    "old_fact_id",
    "reason",
    "idempotency_key",
)

_ACTIVE_KEY_COLUMNS: tuple[str, ...] = (
    "property_id",
    "section",
    "key",
    "fact_id",
    "activated_event_id",
)

_FACT_ASSERTION_NOOP_IGNORED: frozenset[str] = frozenset(
    {"fact_id", "supersedes_fact_id", "asserted_at", "idempotency_key"}
)

_EVENT_REPLAY_PRIORITY: Mapping[str, int] = {
    "fact.asserted": 0,
    "fact.activated": 1,
    "fact.superseded": 2,
    "fact.rejected": 3,
}

_FACT_SELECT_SQL = """
SELECT
    fact_id,
    property_id,
    section,
    key,
    value_json,
    status,
    supersedes_fact_id,
    asserted_at,
    valid_from,
    valid_to,
    source_id,
    source_kind,
    source_locator,
    source_excerpt,
    source_timestamp,
    content_hash,
    extractor,
    confidence,
    review_hint,
    idempotency_key
FROM facts
"""

_EVENT_SELECT_SQL = """
SELECT
    event_id,
    occurred_at,
    kind,
    payload_json,
    actor,
    fact_id,
    old_fact_id,
    reason,
    idempotency_key
FROM events
"""

_SCHEMA_SQL: tuple[str, ...] = (
    """
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS facts (
        fact_id VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY,
        property_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,
        section VARCHAR NOT NULL,
        key VARCHAR NOT NULL,
        value_json TEXT NOT NULL,
        status VARCHAR NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('active', 'pending', 'rejected')),
        supersedes_fact_id VARCHAR,
        asserted_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp,
        valid_from TIMESTAMP,
        valid_to TIMESTAMP,
        source_id VARCHAR,
        source_kind VARCHAR,
        source_locator VARCHAR,
        source_excerpt TEXT,
        source_timestamp TIMESTAMP,
        content_hash VARCHAR,
        extractor VARCHAR,
        confidence DOUBLE NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0 CHECK (confidence >= 0 AND confidence <= 1),
        review_hint TEXT,
        idempotency_key VARCHAR,
        UNIQUE (idempotency_key)
    )
    """,
    """
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events (
        event_id VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY,
        occurred_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp,
        kind VARCHAR NOT NULL,
        payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
        actor VARCHAR,
        fact_id VARCHAR,
        old_fact_id VARCHAR,
        reason TEXT,
        idempotency_key VARCHAR,
        UNIQUE (idempotency_key)
    )
    """,
    """
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS active_fact_keys (
        property_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,
        section VARCHAR NOT NULL,
        key VARCHAR NOT NULL,
        fact_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,
        activated_event_id VARCHAR NOT NULL,
        PRIMARY KEY (property_id, section, key),
        UNIQUE (fact_id)
    )
    """,
)

_INDEX_SQL: tuple[str, ...] = (
    "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_facts_property_section ON facts(property_id, section)",
    "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_facts_key ON facts(property_id, section, key)",
    "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_kind ON events(kind)",
    "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_events_fact_id ON events(fact_id)",
)


def _now_utc_naive() -> datetime:
    return datetime.now(UTC).replace(tzinfo=None)


def _normalize_datetime(value: datetime | None) -> datetime | None:
    if value is None:
        return None
    if value.tzinfo is None:
        return value
    return value.astimezone(UTC).replace(tzinfo=None)


def _json_dumps(value: object) -> str:
    return json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False, separators=(",", ":"), sort_keys=True)


def _json_loads(value: str) -> object:
    return json.loads(value)


def _row_to_dict(
    columns: tuple[str, ...], row: tuple[object, ...] | None
) -> dict[str, object] | None:
    if row is None:
        return None
    return dict(zip(columns, row, strict=True))


def _row_to_fact(row: tuple[object, ...] | None) -> dict[str, object] | None:
    result = _row_to_dict(_FACT_STORAGE_COLUMNS, row)
    if result is None:
        return None
    result["value"] = _json_loads(str(result.pop("value_json")))
    return result


def _row_to_event(row: tuple[object, ...] | None) -> dict[str, object] | None:
    result = _row_to_dict(_EVENT_STORAGE_COLUMNS, row)
    if result is None:
        return None
    result["payload"] = _json_loads(str(result.pop("payload_json")))
    return result


def _matches_existing_fact(
    existing: Mapping[str, object],
    candidate: Mapping[str, object],
) -> bool:
    ignored = {"asserted_at"}
    return all(
        existing[column] == value for column, value in candidate.items() if column not in ignored
    )


def _matches_current_active_fact(
    existing: Mapping[str, object],
    candidate: Mapping[str, object],
) -> bool:
    return all(
        existing[column] == value
        for column, value in candidate.items()
        if column not in _FACT_ASSERTION_NOOP_IGNORED
    )


def _matches_existing_event(
    existing: Mapping[str, object],
    candidate: Mapping[str, object],
) -> bool:
    ignored = {"occurred_at"}
    return all(
        existing[column] == value for column, value in candidate.items() if column not in ignored
    )


def _build_fact_candidate(
    *,
    resolved_fact_id: str,
    property_id: str,
    section: str,
    key: str,
    value: object,
    status: str,
    supersedes_fact_id: str | None,
    asserted_at: datetime,
    valid_from: datetime | None,
    valid_to: datetime | None,
    source_id: str | None,
    source_kind: str | None,
    source_locator: str | None,
    source_excerpt: str | None,
    source_timestamp: datetime | None,
    content_hash: str | None,
    extractor: str | None,
    confidence: float,
    review_hint: str | None,
    idempotency_key: str | None,
) -> dict[str, object]:
    return {
        "fact_id": resolved_fact_id,
        "property_id": property_id,
        "section": section,
        "key": key,
        "value_json": _json_dumps(value),
        "status": status,
        "supersedes_fact_id": supersedes_fact_id,
        "asserted_at": asserted_at,
        "valid_from": _normalize_datetime(valid_from),
        "valid_to": _normalize_datetime(valid_to),
        "source_id": source_id,
        "source_kind": source_kind,
        "source_locator": source_locator,
        "source_excerpt": source_excerpt,
        "source_timestamp": _normalize_datetime(source_timestamp),
        "content_hash": content_hash,
        "extractor": extractor,
        "confidence": float(confidence),
        "review_hint": review_hint,
        "idempotency_key": idempotency_key,
    }


def _fact_event_payload(fact: Mapping[str, object]) -> dict[str, object]:
    return {
        "fact_id": fact["fact_id"],
        "property_id": fact["property_id"],
        "section": fact["section"],
        "key": fact["key"],
        "status": fact["status"],
    }


def _fact_key(fact: Mapping[str, object]) -> tuple[str, str, str]:
    return (str(fact["property_id"]), str(fact["section"]), str(fact["key"]))


def _event_idempotency_key(kind: str, idempotency_key: str | None) -> str | None:
    if idempotency_key is None:
        return None
    return f"{kind}:{idempotency_key}"


def _event_ref(
    event: Mapping[str, object],
    column: str,
    payload_key: str,
) -> str | None:
    value = event.get(column)
    payload = event.get("payload")
    if value is None and isinstance(payload, Mapping):
        value = payload.get(payload_key)
    if value is None:
        return None
    return str(value)


def _event_replay_key(event: Mapping[str, object]) -> tuple[datetime, int, str]:
    occurred_at = event["occurred_at"]
    if not isinstance(occurred_at, datetime):
        msg = "event occurred_at must be a datetime"
        raise TypeError(msg)
    kind = str(event["kind"])
    return (occurred_at, _EVENT_REPLAY_PRIORITY.get(kind, 99), str(event["event_id"]))


def _ensure_transaction_time_axis(time_axis: str) -> None:
    if time_axis in {"transaction", "transaction_time", "tx"}:
        return
    if time_axis in {"valid", "valid_time"}:
        msg = "valid-time as-of queries are not supported in v1; use transaction time"
        raise NotImplementedError(msg)
    raise ValueError(f"unsupported as-of time axis: {time_axis}")


class EventLog:
    def __init__(self, conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection) -> None:
        self._conn = conn

    def emit(
        self,
        kind: str,
        payload: object,
        *,
        event_id: str | None = None,
        occurred_at: datetime | None = None,
        actor: str | None = None,
        fact_id: str | None = None,
        old_fact_id: str | None = None,
        reason: str | None = None,
        idempotency_key: str | None = None,
    ) -> str:
        resolved_event_id = event_id or f"evt_{uuid4().hex}"
        payload_json = _json_dumps(payload)

        if idempotency_key is not None:
            existing = self.fetch_event_by_idempotency_key(idempotency_key)
            if existing is not None:
                return str(existing["event_id"])

        candidate: dict[str, object] = {
            "event_id": resolved_event_id,
            "occurred_at": _normalize_datetime(occurred_at) or _now_utc_naive(),
            "kind": kind,
            "payload_json": payload_json,
            "actor": actor,
            "fact_id": fact_id,
            "old_fact_id": old_fact_id,
            "reason": reason,
            "idempotency_key": idempotency_key,
        }

        existing = self.fetch_event(resolved_event_id, include_storage=True)
        if existing is not None:
            if not _matches_existing_event(existing, candidate):
                raise ValueError(
                    f"event_id already exists with different immutable data: {resolved_event_id}"
                )
            return resolved_event_id

        self._conn.execute(
            """
            INSERT INTO events (
                event_id,
                occurred_at,
                kind,
                payload_json,
                actor,
                fact_id,
                old_fact_id,
                reason,
                idempotency_key
            )
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            """,
            [candidate[column] for column in _EVENT_STORAGE_COLUMNS],
        )
        return resolved_event_id

    def fetch_event(
        self,
        event_id: str,
        *,
        include_storage: bool = False,
    ) -> dict[str, object] | None:
        row = self._conn.execute(
            f"{_EVENT_SELECT_SQL} WHERE event_id = ?",
            [event_id],
        ).fetchone()
        if include_storage:
            return _row_to_dict(_EVENT_STORAGE_COLUMNS, row)
        return _row_to_event(row)

    def fetch_event_by_idempotency_key(self, idempotency_key: str) -> dict[str, object] | None:
        row = self._conn.execute(
            f"{_EVENT_SELECT_SQL} WHERE idempotency_key = ?",
            [idempotency_key],
        ).fetchone()
        return _row_to_event(row)

    def list_events(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
        rows = self._conn.execute(f"{_EVENT_SELECT_SQL} ORDER BY occurred_at, event_id").fetchall()
        return [event for event in (_row_to_event(row) for row in rows) if event is not None]


class FactsStore:
    def __init__(self, conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection) -> None:
        self._conn = conn
        self.event_log = EventLog(conn)

    def init_schema(self) -> None:
        for stmt in _SCHEMA_SQL:
            self._conn.execute(stmt)
        for stmt in _INDEX_SQL:
            self._conn.execute(stmt)

    def append_fact(
        self,
        *,
        property_id: str,
        section: str,
        key: str,
        value: object,
        fact_id: str | None = None,
        status: str = "active",
        supersedes_fact_id: str | None = None,
        asserted_at: datetime | None = None,
        valid_from: datetime | None = None,
        valid_to: datetime | None = None,
        source_id: str | None = None,
        source_kind: str | None = None,
        source_locator: str | None = None,
        source_excerpt: str | None = None,
        source_timestamp: datetime | None = None,
        content_hash: str | None = None,
        extractor: str | None = None,
        confidence: float = 1.0,
        review_hint: str | None = None,
        idempotency_key: str | None = None,
    ) -> str:
        resolved_fact_id = fact_id or f"fact_{uuid4().hex}"
        resolved_asserted_at = _normalize_datetime(asserted_at) or _now_utc_naive()

        return self._append_fact_candidate(
            _build_fact_candidate(
                resolved_fact_id=resolved_fact_id,
                property_id=property_id,
                section=section,
                key=key,
                value=value,
                status=status,
                supersedes_fact_id=supersedes_fact_id,
                asserted_at=resolved_asserted_at,
                valid_from=valid_from,
                valid_to=valid_to,
                source_id=source_id,
                source_kind=source_kind,
                source_locator=source_locator,
                source_excerpt=source_excerpt,
                source_timestamp=source_timestamp,
                content_hash=content_hash,
                extractor=extractor,
                confidence=confidence,
                review_hint=review_hint,
                idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
            )
        )

    def _append_fact_candidate(self, candidate: Mapping[str, object]) -> str:
        status = str(candidate["status"])
        if status not in _FACT_STATUS:
            raise ValueError(f"unsupported fact status: {status}")

        idempotency_key = candidate["idempotency_key"]
        if idempotency_key is not None:
            existing = self.fetch_fact_by_idempotency_key(str(idempotency_key))
            if existing is not None:
                return str(existing["fact_id"])

        resolved_fact_id = str(candidate["fact_id"])

        existing = self.fetch_fact(resolved_fact_id, include_storage=True)
        if existing is not None:
            if not _matches_existing_fact(existing, candidate):
                raise ValueError(
                    f"fact_id already exists with different immutable data: {resolved_fact_id}"
                )
            return resolved_fact_id

        self._conn.execute("BEGIN TRANSACTION")
        try:
            self._conn.execute(
                """
                INSERT INTO facts (
                    fact_id,
                    property_id,
                    section,
                    key,
                    value_json,
                    status,
                    supersedes_fact_id,
                    asserted_at,
                    valid_from,
                    valid_to,
                    source_id,
                    source_kind,
                    source_locator,
                    source_excerpt,
                    source_timestamp,
                    content_hash,
                    extractor,
                    confidence,
                    review_hint,
                    idempotency_key
                )
                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                """,
                [candidate[column] for column in _FACT_STORAGE_COLUMNS],
            )
            assertion_event_id = self.event_log.emit(
                "fact.asserted",
                _fact_event_payload(candidate),
                occurred_at=candidate["asserted_at"],
                fact_id=resolved_fact_id,
                idempotency_key=_event_idempotency_key(
                    "fact.asserted",
                    str(idempotency_key) if idempotency_key is not None else None,
                ),
            )
            if status == "active":
                self._conn.execute(
                    """
                    INSERT INTO active_fact_keys (
                        property_id,
                        section,
                        key,
                        fact_id,
                        activated_event_id
                    )
                    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                    """,
                    [
                        candidate["property_id"],
                        candidate["section"],
                        candidate["key"],
                        resolved_fact_id,
                        assertion_event_id,
                    ],
                )
            self._conn.execute("COMMIT")
        except Exception:
            self._conn.execute("ROLLBACK")
            raise

        return resolved_fact_id

    def upsert_fact(
        self,
        *,
        property_id: str,
        section: str,
        key: str,
        value: object,
        fact_id: str | None = None,
        status: str = "active",
        supersedes_fact_id: str | None = None,
        asserted_at: datetime | None = None,
        valid_from: datetime | None = None,
        valid_to: datetime | None = None,
        source_id: str | None = None,
        source_kind: str | None = None,
        source_locator: str | None = None,
        source_excerpt: str | None = None,
        source_timestamp: datetime | None = None,
        content_hash: str | None = None,
        extractor: str | None = None,
        confidence: float = 1.0,
        review_hint: str | None = None,
        idempotency_key: str | None = None,
    ) -> str:
        if status not in _FACT_STATUS:
            raise ValueError(f"unsupported fact status: {status}")

        if idempotency_key is not None:
            existing = self.fetch_fact_by_idempotency_key(idempotency_key)
            if existing is not None:
                return str(existing["fact_id"])

        resolved_fact_id = fact_id or f"fact_{uuid4().hex}"
        resolved_asserted_at = _normalize_datetime(asserted_at) or _now_utc_naive()
        candidate = _build_fact_candidate(
            resolved_fact_id=resolved_fact_id,
            property_id=property_id,
            section=section,
            key=key,
            value=value,
            status=status,
            supersedes_fact_id=supersedes_fact_id,
            asserted_at=resolved_asserted_at,
            valid_from=valid_from,
            valid_to=valid_to,
            source_id=source_id,
            source_kind=source_kind,
            source_locator=source_locator,
            source_excerpt=source_excerpt,
            source_timestamp=source_timestamp,
            content_hash=content_hash,
            extractor=extractor,
            confidence=confidence,
            review_hint=review_hint,
            idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
        )

        active_key = self.fetch_active_key(property_id, section, key)
        if status == "active" and active_key is not None:
            old_fact_id = str(active_key["fact_id"])
            existing_active = self.fetch_fact(old_fact_id, include_storage=True)
            if existing_active is not None and _matches_current_active_fact(
                existing_active, candidate
            ):
                return old_fact_id
            if supersedes_fact_id is not None and supersedes_fact_id != old_fact_id:
                msg = "supersedes_fact_id must reference the current active fact"
                raise ValueError(msg)
            return self._supersede_with_candidate(old_fact_id, candidate)

        return self._append_fact_candidate(candidate)

    def _supersede_with_candidate(
        self,
        old_fact_id: str,
        candidate: Mapping[str, object],
    ) -> str:
        if candidate["status"] != "active":
            msg = "supersede requires an active replacement fact"
            raise ValueError(msg)

        old_fact = self.fetch_fact(old_fact_id, include_storage=True)
        if old_fact is None:
            raise ValueError(f"old fact does not exist: {old_fact_id}")

        if _fact_key(old_fact) != _fact_key(candidate):
            msg = "replacement fact must use the same property_id, section, and key"
            raise ValueError(msg)

        active_key = self.fetch_active_key(
            str(candidate["property_id"]),
            str(candidate["section"]),
            str(candidate["key"]),
        )
        if active_key is None or active_key["fact_id"] != old_fact_id:
            msg = "old fact is not the current active fact"
            raise ValueError(msg)

        resolved_fact_id = str(candidate["fact_id"])
        candidate_with_link = dict(candidate)
        candidate_with_link["supersedes_fact_id"] = old_fact_id
        idempotency_key = candidate_with_link["idempotency_key"]

        self._conn.execute("BEGIN TRANSACTION")
        try:
            self._conn.execute(
                """
                INSERT INTO facts (
                    fact_id,
                    property_id,
                    section,
                    key,
                    value_json,
                    status,
                    supersedes_fact_id,
                    asserted_at,
                    valid_from,
                    valid_to,
                    source_id,
                    source_kind,
                    source_locator,
                    source_excerpt,
                    source_timestamp,
                    content_hash,
                    extractor,
                    confidence,
                    review_hint,
                    idempotency_key
                )
                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                """,
                [candidate_with_link[column] for column in _FACT_STORAGE_COLUMNS],
            )
            self.event_log.emit(
                "fact.asserted",
                _fact_event_payload(candidate_with_link),
                occurred_at=candidate_with_link["asserted_at"],
                fact_id=resolved_fact_id,
                idempotency_key=_event_idempotency_key(
                    "fact.asserted",
                    str(idempotency_key) if idempotency_key is not None else None,
                ),
            )
            supersede_event_id = self.event_log.emit(
                "fact.superseded",
                {
                    "old_fact_id": old_fact_id,
                    "new_fact_id": resolved_fact_id,
                    "property_id": candidate_with_link["property_id"],
                    "section": candidate_with_link["section"],
                    "key": candidate_with_link["key"],
                },
                occurred_at=candidate_with_link["asserted_at"],
                fact_id=resolved_fact_id,
                old_fact_id=old_fact_id,
                reason="superseded by newer assertion",
                idempotency_key=_event_idempotency_key(
                    "fact.superseded",
                    str(idempotency_key) if idempotency_key is not None else None,
                ),
            )
            self._replace_active_key(candidate_with_link, supersede_event_id)
            self._conn.execute("COMMIT")
        except Exception:
            self._conn.execute("ROLLBACK")
            raise

        return resolved_fact_id

    def supersede_fact(
        self,
        *,
        old_fact_id: str,
        property_id: str,
        section: str,
        key: str,
        value: object,
        fact_id: str | None = None,
        asserted_at: datetime | None = None,
        valid_from: datetime | None = None,
        valid_to: datetime | None = None,
        source_id: str | None = None,
        source_kind: str | None = None,
        source_locator: str | None = None,
        source_excerpt: str | None = None,
        source_timestamp: datetime | None = None,
        content_hash: str | None = None,
        extractor: str | None = None,
        confidence: float = 1.0,
        review_hint: str | None = None,
        idempotency_key: str | None = None,
    ) -> str:
        if idempotency_key is not None:
            existing = self.fetch_fact_by_idempotency_key(idempotency_key)
            if existing is not None:
                return str(existing["fact_id"])

        resolved_fact_id = fact_id or f"fact_{uuid4().hex}"
        resolved_asserted_at = _normalize_datetime(asserted_at) or _now_utc_naive()
        candidate = _build_fact_candidate(
            resolved_fact_id=resolved_fact_id,
            property_id=property_id,
            section=section,
            key=key,
            value=value,
            status="active",
            supersedes_fact_id=old_fact_id,
            asserted_at=resolved_asserted_at,
            valid_from=valid_from,
            valid_to=valid_to,
            source_id=source_id,
            source_kind=source_kind,
            source_locator=source_locator,
            source_excerpt=source_excerpt,
            source_timestamp=source_timestamp,
            content_hash=content_hash,
            extractor=extractor,
            confidence=confidence,
            review_hint=review_hint,
            idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
        )
        return self._supersede_with_candidate(old_fact_id, candidate)

    def append_event(
        self,
        kind: str,
        payload: object,
        *,
        event_id: str | None = None,
        occurred_at: datetime | None = None,
        actor: str | None = None,
        fact_id: str | None = None,
        old_fact_id: str | None = None,
        reason: str | None = None,
        idempotency_key: str | None = None,
    ) -> str:
        return self.event_log.emit(
            kind,
            payload,
            event_id=event_id,
            occurred_at=occurred_at,
            actor=actor,
            fact_id=fact_id,
            old_fact_id=old_fact_id,
            reason=reason,
            idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
        )

    def activate_fact(
        self,
        fact_id: str,
        *,
        actor: str | None = None,
        reason: str | None = None,
        occurred_at: datetime | None = None,
        idempotency_key: str | None = None,
    ) -> str:
        fact = self.fetch_fact(fact_id, include_storage=True)
        if fact is None:
            raise ValueError(f"fact does not exist: {fact_id}")
        if fact["status"] == "rejected":
            raise ValueError(f"rejected fact cannot be activated: {fact_id}")

        active_key = self.fetch_active_key(
            str(fact["property_id"]),
            str(fact["section"]),
            str(fact["key"]),
        )
        if active_key is not None and active_key["fact_id"] == fact_id:
            return fact_id

        resolved_occurred_at = _normalize_datetime(occurred_at) or _now_utc_naive()
        self._conn.execute("BEGIN TRANSACTION")
        try:
            activation_event_id = self.event_log.emit(
                "fact.activated",
                {
                    "fact_id": fact_id,
                    "property_id": fact["property_id"],
                    "section": fact["section"],
                    "key": fact["key"],
                    "activated_by": actor,
                    "reason": reason,
                },
                occurred_at=resolved_occurred_at,
                actor=actor,
                fact_id=fact_id,
                reason=reason,
                idempotency_key=_event_idempotency_key("fact.activated", idempotency_key),
            )

            projection_event_id = activation_event_id
            if active_key is not None:
                old_fact_id = str(active_key["fact_id"])
                projection_event_id = self.event_log.emit(
                    "fact.superseded",
                    {
                        "old_fact_id": old_fact_id,
                        "new_fact_id": fact_id,
                        "property_id": fact["property_id"],
                        "section": fact["section"],
                        "key": fact["key"],
                    },
                    occurred_at=resolved_occurred_at,
                    actor=actor,
                    fact_id=fact_id,
                    old_fact_id=old_fact_id,
                    reason=reason or "superseded by activated fact",
                    idempotency_key=_event_idempotency_key("fact.superseded", idempotency_key),
                )

            self._replace_active_key(fact, projection_event_id)
            self._conn.execute("COMMIT")
        except Exception:
            self._conn.execute("ROLLBACK")
            raise

        return fact_id

    def _replace_active_key(
        self,
        fact: Mapping[str, object],
        activated_event_id: str,
    ) -> None:
        self._conn.execute(
            """
            DELETE FROM active_fact_keys
            WHERE property_id = ? AND section = ? AND key = ?
            """,
            [fact["property_id"], fact["section"], fact["key"]],
        )
        self._conn.execute(
            """
            INSERT INTO active_fact_keys (
                property_id,
                section,
                key,
                fact_id,
                activated_event_id
            )
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            """,
            [
                fact["property_id"],
                fact["section"],
                fact["key"],
                fact["fact_id"],
                activated_event_id,
            ],
        )

    def fetch_fact(
        self,
        fact_id: str,
        *,
        include_storage: bool = False,
    ) -> dict[str, object] | None:
        row = self._conn.execute(
            f"{_FACT_SELECT_SQL} WHERE fact_id = ?",
            [fact_id],
        ).fetchone()
        if include_storage:
            return _row_to_dict(_FACT_STORAGE_COLUMNS, row)
        return _row_to_fact(row)

    def fetch_fact_by_idempotency_key(self, idempotency_key: str) -> dict[str, object] | None:
        row = self._conn.execute(
            f"{_FACT_SELECT_SQL} WHERE idempotency_key = ?",
            [idempotency_key],
        ).fetchone()
        return _row_to_fact(row)

    def list_facts(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
        rows = self._conn.execute(f"{_FACT_SELECT_SQL} ORDER BY asserted_at, fact_id").fetchall()
        return [fact for fact in (_row_to_fact(row) for row in rows) if fact is not None]

    def list_facts_by_section(
        self,
        property_id: str,
        section: str,
    ) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
        rows = self._conn.execute(
            f"""
            {_FACT_SELECT_SQL}
            WHERE property_id = ? AND section = ?
            ORDER BY key, asserted_at, fact_id
            """,
            [property_id, section],
        ).fetchall()
        return [fact for fact in (_row_to_fact(row) for row in rows) if fact is not None]

    def list_events(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
        return self.event_log.list_events()

    def list_active_facts(self, property_id: str | None = None) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
        active_keys = self.list_active_keys(property_id=property_id)
        return self._facts_for_projection(active_keys)

    def list_active_facts_by_section(
        self,
        property_id: str,
        section: str,
    ) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
        active_keys = self.list_active_keys(property_id=property_id, section=section)
        return self._facts_for_projection(active_keys)

    def list_active_facts_as_of(
        self,
        property_id: str,
        as_of: datetime,
        *,
        section: str | None = None,
        time_axis: str = "transaction",
    ) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
        _ensure_transaction_time_axis(time_axis)
        active_keys = self.replay_active_projection(
            as_of=_normalize_datetime(as_of),
            property_id=property_id,
            section=section,
        )
        return self._facts_for_projection(active_keys)

    def _facts_for_projection(
        self,
        active_keys: list[dict[str, object]],
    ) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
        facts: list[dict[str, object]] = []
        for active_key in active_keys:
            fact = self.fetch_fact(str(active_key["fact_id"]))
            if fact is None:
                continue
            fact["current_status"] = "active"
            fact["activated_event_id"] = active_key["activated_event_id"]
            facts.append(fact)
        return facts

    def list_active_keys(
        self,
        *,
        property_id: str | None = None,
        section: str | None = None,
    ) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
        if property_id is not None and section is not None:
            rows = self._conn.execute(
                """
                SELECT property_id, section, key, fact_id, activated_event_id
                FROM active_fact_keys
                WHERE property_id = ? AND section = ?
                ORDER BY property_id, section, key
                """,
                [property_id, section],
            ).fetchall()
        elif property_id is not None:
            rows = self._conn.execute(
                """
                SELECT property_id, section, key, fact_id, activated_event_id
                FROM active_fact_keys
                WHERE property_id = ?
                ORDER BY property_id, section, key
                """,
                [property_id],
            ).fetchall()
        elif section is not None:
            rows = self._conn.execute(
                """
                SELECT property_id, section, key, fact_id, activated_event_id
                FROM active_fact_keys
                WHERE section = ?
                ORDER BY property_id, section, key
                """,
                [section],
            ).fetchall()
        else:
            rows = self._conn.execute(
                """
                SELECT property_id, section, key, fact_id, activated_event_id
                FROM active_fact_keys
                ORDER BY property_id, section, key
                """,
            ).fetchall()
        return [key for key in (_row_to_dict(_ACTIVE_KEY_COLUMNS, row) for row in rows) if key]

    def fetch_active_key(
        self,
        property_id: str,
        section: str,
        key: str,
    ) -> dict[str, object] | None:
        row = self._conn.execute(
            """
            SELECT property_id, section, key, fact_id, activated_event_id
            FROM active_fact_keys
            WHERE property_id = ? AND section = ? AND key = ?
            """,
            [property_id, section, key],
        ).fetchone()
        return _row_to_dict(_ACTIVE_KEY_COLUMNS, row)

    def replay_active_projection(
        self,
        *,
        as_of: datetime | None = None,
        property_id: str | None = None,
        section: str | None = None,
    ) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
        normalized_as_of = _normalize_datetime(as_of)
        facts_by_id = self._facts_by_id_for_replay(normalized_as_of)
        asserted_event_ids = self._asserted_event_ids(normalized_as_of)
        active_by_key = self._seed_active_projection(facts_by_id, asserted_event_ids)

        for event in self._events_for_replay(normalized_as_of):
            self._apply_projection_event(event, facts_by_id, active_by_key)

        rows = [
            {
                "property_id": key[0],
                "section": key[1],
                "key": key[2],
                "fact_id": fact_id,
                "activated_event_id": activated_event_id,
            }
            for key, (fact_id, activated_event_id) in active_by_key.items()
            if (property_id is None or key[0] == property_id)
            and (section is None or key[1] == section)
        ]
        return sorted(rows, key=lambda row: (row["property_id"], row["section"], row["key"]))

    def rebuild_active_projection(self) -> None:
        active_keys = self.replay_active_projection()
        self._conn.execute("BEGIN TRANSACTION")
        try:
            self._conn.execute("DELETE FROM active_fact_keys")
            for active_key in active_keys:
                self._conn.execute(
                    """
                    INSERT INTO active_fact_keys (
                        property_id,
                        section,
                        key,
                        fact_id,
                        activated_event_id
                    )
                    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                    """,
                    [active_key[column] for column in _ACTIVE_KEY_COLUMNS],
                )
            self._conn.execute("COMMIT")
        except Exception:
            self._conn.execute("ROLLBACK")
            raise

    def _facts_by_id_for_replay(
        self,
        as_of: datetime | None,
    ) -> dict[str, dict[str, object]]:
        if as_of is None:
            rows = self._conn.execute(
                f"{_FACT_SELECT_SQL} ORDER BY asserted_at, fact_id"
            ).fetchall()
        else:
            rows = self._conn.execute(
                f"""
                {_FACT_SELECT_SQL}
                WHERE asserted_at <= ?
                ORDER BY asserted_at, fact_id
                """,
                [as_of],
            ).fetchall()
        facts = [_row_to_dict(_FACT_STORAGE_COLUMNS, row) for row in rows]
        return {str(fact["fact_id"]): fact for fact in facts if fact is not None}

    def _events_for_replay(self, as_of: datetime | None) -> list[dict[str, object]]:
        if as_of is None:
            events = self.list_events()
        else:
            rows = self._conn.execute(
                f"""
                {_EVENT_SELECT_SQL}
                WHERE occurred_at <= ?
                """,
                [as_of],
            ).fetchall()
            events = [event for event in (_row_to_event(row) for row in rows) if event is not None]
        return sorted(events, key=_event_replay_key)

    def _asserted_event_ids(self, as_of: datetime | None) -> dict[str, str]:
        asserted_event_ids: dict[str, str] = {}
        for event in self._events_for_replay(as_of):
            if event["kind"] != "fact.asserted":
                continue
            fact_id = _event_ref(event, "fact_id", "fact_id")
            if fact_id is not None:
                asserted_event_ids[fact_id] = str(event["event_id"])
        return asserted_event_ids

    def _seed_active_projection(
        self,
        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
        asserted_event_ids: Mapping[str, str],
    ) -> dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]]:
        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]] = {}
        for fact_id, fact in facts_by_id.items():
            if fact["status"] != "active":
                continue
            active_by_key[_fact_key(fact)] = (
                fact_id,
                asserted_event_ids.get(fact_id, f"asserted:{fact_id}"),
            )
        return active_by_key

    def _apply_projection_event(
        self,
        event: Mapping[str, object],
        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]],
    ) -> None:
        kind = event["kind"]
        if kind == "fact.asserted":
            self._apply_asserted_event(event, facts_by_id, active_by_key)
        elif kind == "fact.activated":
            self._activate_projection_fact(event, facts_by_id, active_by_key)
        elif kind == "fact.superseded":
            self._apply_superseded_event(event, facts_by_id, active_by_key)
        elif kind == "fact.rejected":
            fact_id = _event_ref(event, "fact_id", "fact_id")
            if fact_id is not None:
                self._remove_projection_fact(fact_id, facts_by_id, active_by_key)

    def _apply_asserted_event(
        self,
        event: Mapping[str, object],
        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]],
    ) -> None:
        fact_id = _event_ref(event, "fact_id", "fact_id")
        if fact_id is None:
            return
        fact = facts_by_id.get(fact_id)
        if fact is not None and fact["status"] == "active":
            active_by_key[_fact_key(fact)] = (fact_id, str(event["event_id"]))

    def _activate_projection_fact(
        self,
        event: Mapping[str, object],
        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]],
    ) -> None:
        fact_id = _event_ref(event, "fact_id", "fact_id")
        if fact_id is None:
            return
        fact = facts_by_id.get(fact_id)
        if fact is not None and fact["status"] != "rejected":
            active_by_key[_fact_key(fact)] = (fact_id, str(event["event_id"]))

    def _apply_superseded_event(
        self,
        event: Mapping[str, object],
        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]],
    ) -> None:
        old_fact_id = _event_ref(event, "old_fact_id", "old_fact_id")
        if old_fact_id is not None:
            self._remove_projection_fact(old_fact_id, facts_by_id, active_by_key)

        new_fact_id = _event_ref(event, "fact_id", "new_fact_id")
        if new_fact_id is None:
            return
        new_fact = facts_by_id.get(new_fact_id)
        if new_fact is not None and new_fact["status"] != "rejected":
            active_by_key[_fact_key(new_fact)] = (new_fact_id, str(event["event_id"]))

    def _remove_projection_fact(
        self,
        fact_id: str,
        facts_by_id: Mapping[str, Mapping[str, object]],
        active_by_key: dict[tuple[str, str, str], tuple[str, str]],
    ) -> None:
        fact = facts_by_id.get(fact_id)
        if fact is None:
            return
        key = _fact_key(fact)
        if active_by_key.get(key, (None, None))[0] == fact_id:
            del active_by_key[key]


def open_facts(db_path: Path) -> FactsStore:
    conn = connect(db_path)
    store = FactsStore(conn)
    store.init_schema()
    return store

1	from __future__ import annotations
2	
3	import json
4	from collections import defaultdict
5	from collections.abc import Iterable, Mapping
6	from dataclasses import dataclass
7	from datetime import date, datetime
8	from enum import Enum
9	from pathlib import Path
10	
11	import anyio
12	
13	
14	@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)
15	class Citation:
16	    source_id: str | None = None
17	    source_kind: str | None = None
18	    source_uri: str | None = None
19	    locator: str | None = None
20	    quote: str | None = None
21	
22	
23	@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)
24	class RenderRecord:
25	    section: str
26	    key: str
27	    status: str
28	    value: object
29	    question: str | None
30	    fact_id: str | None
31	    citation: Citation
32	    confidence: float | None
33	
34	
35	def building_markdown_path(output_dir: Path, property_id: str) -> Path:
36	    safe_property_id = _safe_property_id(property_id)
37	    return output_dir / safe_property_id / "building.md"
38	
39	
40	def render_building_markdown(property_id: str, records: Iterable[object]) -> str:
41	    safe_property_id = _safe_property_id(property_id)
42	    render_records = sorted(
43	        _iter_render_records(safe_property_id, records),
44	        key=_record_sort_key,
45	    )
46	
47	    lines = [f"# Building {safe_property_id}", ""]
48	    if not render_records:
49	        lines.append("_No active or pending facts._")
50	        lines.append("")
51	        return "\n".join(lines)
52	
53	    by_section: dict[str, list[RenderRecord]] = defaultdict(list)
54	    for record in render_records:
55	        by_section[record.section].append(record)
56	
57	    for section in sorted(by_section, key=_sort_text):
58	        lines.extend((f"## {_section_title(section)}", ""))
59	        section_records = by_section[section]
60	        active = [record for record in section_records if record.status == "active"]
61	        pending_questions = [
62	            record for record in section_records if record.status == "pending" and record.question
63	        ]
64	        pending_facts = [
65	            record
66	            for record in section_records
67	            if record.status == "pending" and not record.question
68	        ]
69	
70	        if active:
71	            lines.extend(("### Active Facts", ""))
72	            lines.extend(_fact_line(record) for record in active)
73	            lines.append("")
74	        if pending_questions:
75	            lines.extend(("### Pending Questions", ""))
76	            lines.extend(_question_line(record) for record in pending_questions)
77	            lines.append("")
78	        if pending_facts:
79	            lines.extend(("### Pending Facts", ""))
80	            lines.extend(_fact_line(record) for record in pending_facts)
81	            lines.append("")
82	
83	    return "\n".join(lines)
84	
85	
86	async def write_building_markdown(
87	    output_dir: Path,
88	    property_id: str,
89	    records: Iterable[object],
90	) -> Path:
91	    path = building_markdown_path(output_dir, property_id)
92	    content = render_building_markdown(property_id, records)
93	    async_path = anyio.Path(path)
94	    await async_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
95	    await async_path.write_text(content, encoding="utf-8")
96	    return path
97	
98	
99	def _iter_render_records(property_id: str, records: Iterable[object]) -> Iterable[RenderRecord]:
100	    for record in records:
101	        data = _as_mapping(record)
102	        if data is None or not _belongs_to_property(property_id, data):
103	            continue
104	
105	        section = _text(data.get("section"))
106	        if section is None:
107	            continue
108	        status = _status(data.get("status"))
109	        if status not in {"active", "pending"}:
110	            continue
111	
112	        question = _first_text(data, ("question", "message", "review_hint"))
113	        value_missing = "value" not in data
114	        value = None if value_missing else data.get("value")
115	        key = _text(data.get("key")) or ("question" if question else "fact")
116	        citation = _citation(data)
117	        confidence = _confidence(data.get("confidence"))
118	
119	        yield RenderRecord(
120	            section=section,
121	            key=key,
122	            status=status,
123	            value=value,
124	            question=question if status == "pending" and value_missing else None,
125	            fact_id=_text(data.get("fact_id")),
126	            citation=citation,
127	            confidence=confidence,
128	        )
129	
130	
131	def _as_mapping(record: object) -> Mapping[str, object] | None:
132	    if isinstance(record, Mapping):
133	        return record
134	
135	    model_dump = getattr(record, "model_dump", None)
136	    if callable(model_dump):
137	        try:
138	            dumped = model_dump(mode="python")
139	        except TypeError:
140	            dumped = model_dump()
141	        return dumped if isinstance(dumped, Mapping) else None
142	
143	    return None
144	
145	
146	def _belongs_to_property(property_id: str, data: Mapping[str, object]) -> bool:
147	    record_property_id = _text(data.get("property_id"))
148	    return record_property_id is None or record_property_id == property_id
149	
150	
151	def _status(value: object) -> str:
152	    text = _text(value)
153	    return (text or "active").lower()
154	
155	
156	def _citation(data: Mapping[str, object]) -> Citation:
157	    nested = _as_mapping(data.get("citation")) or _as_mapping(data.get("source")) or {}
158	    return Citation(
159	        source_id=_first_text(nested, ("source_id", "id")) or _first_text(data, ("source_id",)),
160	        source_kind=_first_text(nested, ("source_kind", "kind"))
161	        or _first_text(data, ("source_kind",)),
162	        source_uri=_first_text(nested, ("source_uri", "uri")) or _first_text(data, ("source_uri",)),
163	        locator=_first_text(nested, ("locator", "source_locator"))
164	        or _first_text(data, ("source_locator", "locator")),
165	        quote=_first_text(nested, ("quote", "source_excerpt"))
166	        or _first_text(data, ("source_excerpt", "quote")),
167	    )
168	
169	
170	def _first_text(data: Mapping[str, object], keys: tuple[str, ...]) -> str | None:
171	    for key in keys:
172	        text = _text(data.get(key))
173	        if text:
174	            return text
175	    return None
176	
177	
178	def _text(value: object) -> str | None:
179	    if value is None:
180	        return None
181	    if isinstance(value, Enum):
182	        value = value.value
183	    text = str(value).strip()
184	    return text or None
185	
186	
187	def _confidence(value: object) -> float | None:
188	    if value is None:
189	        return None
190	    try:
191	        confidence = float(value)
192	    except (TypeError, ValueError):
193	        return None
194	    if confidence < 0 or confidence > 1:
195	        return None
196	    return confidence
197	
198	
199	def _fact_line(record: RenderRecord) -> str:
200	    return f"- {_code_span(record.key)}: {_format_value(record.value)}{_citation_suffix(record)}"
201	
202	
203	def _question_line(record: RenderRecord) -> str:
204	    question = record.question or _format_value(record.value)
205	    return f"- {_code_span(record.key)}: {_inline_text(question)}{_citation_suffix(record)}"
206	
207	
208	def _citation_suffix(record: RenderRecord) -> str:
209	    parts: list[str] = []
210	    source = _source_text(record.citation)
211	    if source is not None:
212	        parts.append(f"source: {source}")
213	    if record.citation.locator is not None:
214	        parts.append(f"locator: {_code_span(record.citation.locator)}")
215	    if record.confidence is not None:
216	        parts.append(f"confidence: {_format_confidence(record.confidence)}")
217	    if not parts:
218	        return ""
219	
220	    suffix = f" _({'; '.join(parts)})_"
221	    if record.citation.quote is None:
222	        return suffix
223	    return f"{suffix}\n  > {_inline_text(record.citation.quote)}"
224	
225	
226	def _source_text(citation: Citation) -> str | None:
227	    if citation.source_kind is not None and citation.source_id is not None:
228	        label = f"{citation.source_kind}:{citation.source_id}"
229	    else:
230	        label = citation.source_id or citation.source_kind
231	    if label is None:
232	        return None
233	    if citation.source_uri is None:
234	        return _escape_markdown(label)
235	    return f"[{_escape_link_label(label)}]({citation.source_uri})"
236	
237	
238	def _format_value(value: object) -> str:
239	    if isinstance(value, str):
240	        return _inline_text(value)
241	    return json.dumps(
242	        _json_ready(value),
243	        default=str,
244	        ensure_ascii=False,
245	        separators=(", ", ": "),
246	        sort_keys=True,
247	    )
248	
249	
250	def _json_ready(value: object) -> object:
251	    if isinstance(value, Enum):
252	        return value.value
253	    if isinstance(value, Mapping):
254	        return {str(key): _json_ready(value[key]) for key in sorted(value, key=str)}
255	    if isinstance(value, tuple | list):
256	        return [_json_ready(item) for item in value]
257	    if isinstance(value, set | frozenset):
258	        return [_json_ready(item) for item in sorted(value, key=str)]
259	    if isinstance(value, datetime | date):
260	        return value.isoformat()
261	    return value
262	
263	
264	def _format_confidence(value: float) -> str:
265	    return f"{value:.3f}".rstrip("0").rstrip(".")
266	
267	
268	def _inline_text(value: object) -> str:
269	    return " ".join(str(value).split())
270	
271	
272	def _code_span(value: object) -> str:
273	    text = _inline_text(value)
274	    if "`" not in text:
275	        return f"`{text}`"
276	    return f"`` {text} ``"
277	
278	
279	def _escape_markdown(value: str) -> str:
280	    return value.replace("\\", "\\\\").replace("*", "\\*").replace("_", "\\_")
281	
282	
283	def _escape_link_label(value: str) -> str:
284	    return _escape_markdown(value).replace("[", "\\[").replace("]", "\\]")
285	
286	
287	def _section_title(section: str) -> str:
288	    return section.replace("_", " ").replace("-", " ").title()
289	
290	
291	def _record_sort_key(record: RenderRecord) -> tuple[str, ...]:
292	    return (
293	        _sort_text(record.section),
294	        record.status,
295	        _sort_text(record.key),
296	        _sort_text(record.fact_id or ""),
297	        _sort_text(_format_value(record.value)),
298	        _sort_text(record.question or ""),
299	        _sort_text(record.citation.source_kind or ""),
300	        _sort_text(record.citation.source_id or ""),
301	        _sort_text(record.citation.locator or ""),
302	    )
303	
304	
305	def _sort_text(value: str) -> str:
306	    return value.casefold()
307	
308	
309	def _safe_property_id(property_id: str) -> str:
310	    safe_property_id = property_id.strip()
311	    parts = Path(safe_property_id).parts
312	    if (
313	        not safe_property_id
314	        or Path(safe_property_id).is_absolute()
315	        or ".." in parts
316	        or len(parts) != 1
317	    ):
318	        raise ValueError("invalid property_id")
319	    return safe_property_id
320

1	from __future__ import annotations
2	
3	from datetime import UTC, datetime, timedelta
4	from pathlib import Path
5	
6	import duckdb
7	import pytest
8	
9	from app.storage.facts import EventLog, open_facts
10	
11	
12	def test_init_schema_creates_tables(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
13	    store = open_facts(tmp_path / "facts.duckdb")
14	
15	    rows = store._conn.execute(
16	        """
17	        SELECT table_name
18	        FROM information_schema.tables
19	        WHERE table_name IN ('facts', 'events', 'active_fact_keys')
20	        ORDER BY table_name
21	        """
22	    ).fetchall()
23	
24	    assert rows == [("active_fact_keys",), ("events",), ("facts",)]
25	
26	
27	def test_upsert_fact_appends_row_and_active_projection(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
28	    store = open_facts(tmp_path / "facts.duckdb")
29	
30	    fact_id = store.upsert_fact(
31	        property_id="LIE-001",
32	        section="contacts",
33	        key="manager",
34	        value={"name": "Hausverwaltung Berlin"},
35	        source_id="stamm-1",
36	        source_kind="stammdaten",
37	        source_locator="/verwaltung/name",
38	        confidence=0.98,
39	    )
40	
41	    fact = store.fetch_fact(fact_id)
42	    assert fact is not None
43	    assert fact["property_id"] == "LIE-001"
44	    assert fact["section"] == "contacts"
45	    assert fact["key"] == "manager"
46	    assert fact["value"] == {"name": "Hausverwaltung Berlin"}
47	    assert fact["source_kind"] == "stammdaten"
48	    assert fact["confidence"] == 0.98
49	
50	    active_key = store.fetch_active_key("LIE-001", "contacts", "manager")
51	    assert active_key is not None
52	    assert active_key["fact_id"] == fact_id
53	
54	
55	def test_upsert_fact_with_idempotency_key_is_noop_on_duplicate(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
56	    store = open_facts(tmp_path / "facts.duckdb")
57	
58	    first = store.upsert_fact(
59	        property_id="LIE-001",
60	        section="finance",
61	        key="iban",
62	        value={"iban": "DE02120300000000202051"},
63	        idempotency_key="env-1:iban",
64	    )
65	    second = store.upsert_fact(
66	        property_id="LIE-001",
67	        section="finance",
68	        key="iban",
69	        value={"iban": "DE02120300000000202051"},
70	        idempotency_key="env-1:iban",
71	    )
72	
73	    assert second == first
74	    assert len(store.list_facts()) == 1
75	    assert [event["kind"] for event in store.list_events()] == ["fact.asserted"]
76	
77	
78	def test_duplicate_active_upsert_without_idempotency_is_noop(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
79	    store = open_facts(tmp_path / "facts.duckdb")
80	
81	    first = store.upsert_fact(
82	        property_id="LIE-001",
83	        section="contacts",
84	        key="manager",
85	        value={"name": "Hausverwaltung Berlin"},
86	        source_id="stamm-1",
87	        source_kind="stammdaten",
88	        source_locator="/verwaltung/name",
89	        confidence=0.98,
90	    )
91	    second = store.upsert_fact(
92	        property_id="LIE-001",
93	        section="contacts",
94	        key="manager",
95	        value={"name": "Hausverwaltung Berlin"},
96	        source_id="stamm-1",
97	        source_kind="stammdaten",
98	        source_locator="/verwaltung/name",
99	        confidence=0.98,
100	    )
101	
102	    assert second == first
103	    assert len(store.list_facts()) == 1
104	    assert [event["kind"] for event in store.list_events()] == ["fact.asserted"]
105	
106	
107	def test_upsert_supersedes_active_fact_without_mutating_old_row(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
108	    store = open_facts(tmp_path / "facts.duckdb")
109	    first_at = datetime(2026, 5, 4, 8, 0, tzinfo=UTC)
110	    second_at = datetime(2026, 5, 4, 9, 0, tzinfo=UTC)
111	
112	    old_fact_id = store.upsert_fact(
113	        fact_id="fact-old",
114	        property_id="LIE-001",
115	        section="contacts",
116	        key="manager",
117	        value={"name": "Old Verwaltung"},
118	        source_id="mail-1",
119	        source_kind="email",
120	        source_locator="message:1",
121	        asserted_at=first_at,
122	        idempotency_key="mail-1:manager",
123	    )
124	    old_before = store.fetch_fact(old_fact_id)
125	
126	    new_fact_id = store.upsert_fact(
127	        fact_id="fact-new",
128	        property_id="LIE-001",
129	        section="contacts",
130	        key="manager",
131	        value={"name": "New Verwaltung"},
132	        source_id="mail-2",
133	        source_kind="email",
134	        source_locator="message:2",
135	        asserted_at=second_at,
136	        idempotency_key="mail-2:manager",
137	    )
138	
139	    assert new_fact_id != old_fact_id
140	    assert store.fetch_fact(old_fact_id) == old_before
141	    assert store.fetch_fact(new_fact_id)["supersedes_fact_id"] == old_fact_id
142	    assert store.fetch_active_key("LIE-001", "contacts", "manager")["fact_id"] == new_fact_id
143	    assert [fact["fact_id"] for fact in store.list_active_facts("LIE-001")] == [new_fact_id]
144	    assert [event["kind"] for event in store.list_events()].count("fact.superseded") == 1
145	
146	
147	def test_active_and_by_section_queries_return_current_projection(tmp_path: Path) -> None:
148	    store = open_facts(tmp_path / "facts.duckdb")
149	
150	    store.upsert_fact(
