from __future__ import annotations

import json
from datetime import UTC, datetime
from pathlib import Path

import pytest

from app.extract.models import Fact, FactStatus
from app.ingest.envelope import Envelope
from app.verticals.property_de.skills.stammdaten import (
    SOURCE_KIND,
    StammdatenExtractor,
    StammdatenInput,
    parse_stammdaten,
)

DATA_PATH = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[3] / "data" / "stammdaten" / "stammdaten.json"
PAYLOAD_HASH = "c" * 64


@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def stammdaten_payload() -> dict[str, object]:
    return json.loads(DATA_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def _facts_by_section_key(facts: list[Fact]) -> dict[tuple[str, str], Fact]:
    return {(fact.section, fact.key): fact for fact in facts}


async def test_parse_stammdaten_extracts_property_overview(
    stammdaten_payload: dict[str, object],
) -> None:
    skill_input = StammdatenInput(
        payload=stammdaten_payload,
        source_id="stamm-1",
        source_uri="data/stammdaten/stammdaten.json",
        source_timestamp=datetime(2026, 5, 4, tzinfo=UTC),
    )

    result = await parse_stammdaten(skill_input)
    facts = list(result.facts)
    by_key = _facts_by_section_key(facts)

    overview = by_key[("property", "overview")]
    assert overview.value == {
        "id": "LIE-001",
        "name": "WEG Immanuelkirchstraße 26",
        "strasse": "Immanuelkirchstraße 26",
        "plz": "10405",
        "ort": "Berlin",
        "baujahr": 1928,
        "sanierung": 2008,
    }
    assert overview.status is FactStatus.ACTIVE
    assert overview.citation.source_kind == SOURCE_KIND
    assert overview.citation.source_id == "stamm-1"
    assert overview.citation.locator == "/liegenschaft"
    assert overview.confidence == 1.0
    assert result.gap_signals == []


async def test_parse_stammdaten_extracts_manager_and_finance(
    stammdaten_payload: dict[str, object],
) -> None:
    skill_input = StammdatenInput(
        payload=stammdaten_payload,
        source_id="stamm-1",
    )

    result = await parse_stammdaten(skill_input)
    by_key = _facts_by_section_key(list(result.facts))

    manager = by_key[("contacts", "manager")]
    assert isinstance(manager.value, dict)
    assert manager.value["name"] == "Huber & Partner Immobilienverwaltung GmbH"
    assert manager.value["email"] == "info@huber-partner-verwaltung.de"

    weg = by_key[("finance", "iban_weg")]
    assert isinstance(weg.value, dict)
    assert weg.value["iban"] == "DE02100100100123456789"
    assert weg.value["role"] == "weg"

    assert ("finance", "iban_ruecklage") in by_key
    assert ("finance", "iban_verwalter") in by_key


async def test_parse_stammdaten_extracts_buildings_and_units(
    stammdaten_payload: dict[str, object],
) -> None:
    skill_input = StammdatenInput(payload=stammdaten_payload, source_id="stamm-1")

from __future__ import annotations

import json
from datetime import UTC, datetime
from pathlib import Path

import pytest

from app.extract.models import Fact, FactStatus
from app.ingest.envelope import Envelope
from app.verticals.property_de.skills.stammdaten import (
    SOURCE_KIND,
    StammdatenExtractor,
    StammdatenInput,
    parse_stammdaten,
)

DATA_PATH = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[3] / "data" / "stammdaten" / "stammdaten.json"
PAYLOAD_HASH = "c" * 64


@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def stammdaten_payload() -> dict[str, object]:
    return json.loads(DATA_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def _facts_by_section_key(facts: list[Fact]) -> dict[tuple[str, str], Fact]:
    return {(fact.section, fact.key): fact for fact in facts}


async def test_parse_stammdaten_extracts_property_overview(
    stammdaten_payload: dict[str, object],
) -> None:
    skill_input = StammdatenInput(
        payload=stammdaten_payload,
        source_id="stamm-1",
        source_uri="data/stammdaten/stammdaten.json",
        source_timestamp=datetime(2026, 5, 4, tzinfo=UTC),
    )

    result = await parse_stammdaten(skill_input)
    facts = list(result.facts)
    by_key = _facts_by_section_key(facts)

    overview = by_key[("property", "overview")]
    assert overview.value == {
        "id": "LIE-001",
        "name": "WEG Immanuelkirchstraße 26",
        "strasse": "Immanuelkirchstraße 26",
        "plz": "10405",
        "ort": "Berlin",
        "baujahr": 1928,
        "sanierung": 2008,
    }
    assert overview.status is FactStatus.ACTIVE
    assert overview.citation.source_kind == SOURCE_KIND
    assert overview.citation.source_id == "stamm-1"
    assert overview.citation.locator == "/liegenschaft"
    assert overview.confidence == 1.0
    assert result.gap_signals == []


async def test_parse_stammdaten_extracts_manager_and_finance(
    stammdaten_payload: dict[str, object],
) -> None:
    skill_input = StammdatenInput(
        payload=stammdaten_payload,
        source_id="stamm-1",
    )

    result = await parse_stammdaten(skill_input)
    by_key = _facts_by_section_key(list(result.facts))

    manager = by_key[("contacts", "manager")]
    assert isinstance(manager.value, dict)
    assert manager.value["name"] == "Huber & Partner Immobilienverwaltung GmbH"
    assert manager.value["email"] == "info@huber-partner-verwaltung.de"

    weg = by_key[("finance", "iban_weg")]
    assert isinstance(weg.value, dict)
    assert weg.value["iban"] == "DE02100100100123456789"
    assert weg.value["role"] == "weg"

    assert ("finance", "iban_ruecklage") in by_key
    assert ("finance", "iban_verwalter") in by_key


async def test_parse_stammdaten_extracts_buildings_and_units(
    stammdaten_payload: dict[str, object],
) -> None:

)

)


def _by_key(facts: list[Fact]) -> dict[str, Fact]:
    return {fact.key: fact for fact in facts}


async def test_parse_bank_csv_emits_one_fact_per_transaction() -> None:
    skill_input = BankCsvInput(
        payload=CSV_SAMPLE,
        property_id="LIE-001",
        source_id="bank-1",
        source_uri="data/bank/sample.csv",
    )

    result = await parse_bank_csv(skill_input)
    facts = list(result.facts)
    by_key = _by_key(facts)

    assert set(by_key) == {"tx-00001", "tx-00002"}
    credit = by_key["tx-00001"]
    assert credit.section == "bank"
    assert credit.value["direction"] == "credit"
    assert credit.value["amount_eur"] == "1256.00"
    assert credit.value["counterparty_iban"] == "DE80370400447710932480"
    assert credit.citation.source_kind == "bank-csv"

    debit = by_key["tx-00002"]
    assert debit.value["direction"] == "debit"
    assert debit.value["amount_eur"] == "-150.00"
    assert result.gap_signals == []


async def test_parse_bank_csv_emits_gap_signal_for_missing_reference() -> None:
    csv_text = (
        "Auftragskonto;Kundenreferenz (End-to-End);Betrag;Waehrung\n"
        "DE02;;100,00;EUR\n"
    )
    result = await parse_bank_csv(
        BankCsvInput(payload=csv_text, property_id="LIE-001", source_id="bank-1")
    )

    assert result.facts == []
    assert len(result.gap_signals) == 1
    assert result.gap_signals[0].kind == "missing"


async def test_parse_camt053_emits_signed_credit_and_debit_facts() -> None:
    skill_input = CamtInput(
        payload=CAMT_SAMPLE,
        property_id="LIE-001",
        source_id="bank-camt",
        source_uri="data/bank/sample.xml",
    )
    result = await parse_camt053(skill_input)
    by_key = _by_key(list(result.facts))

    credit = by_key["tx-00001"]
    debit = by_key["tx-00002"]
    assert credit.value["direction"] == "credit"
    assert credit.value["amount_eur"] == "1256.00"
    assert credit.value["purpose"] == "Miete 01/2024 EH-045"
    assert credit.value["counterparty_iban"] == "DE80370400447710932480"
    assert credit.citation.source_kind == "camt053"
    assert debit.value["direction"] == "debit"
    assert debit.value["amount_eur"] == "-150.00"


async def test_camt053_extractor_handles_envelope_payload() -> None:
    envelope = Envelope(
        source="bank-camt",
        kind="camt053",
        org="org_demo_berlin",
        property="LIE-001",
        content_type="application/xml",
        payload_uri="data/bank/sample.xml",
        payload_hash=PAYLOAD_HASH,
    )

    result = await CamtExtractor().extract(envelope, CAMT_SAMPLE.encode("utf-8"))
    assert {fact.key for fact in result.facts} == {"tx-00001", "tx-00002"}

facts: list[Fact] = []
    gap_signals: list[GapSignal] = []
    entries = list(root.iter(f"{CAMT_NAMESPACE}Ntry"))
    for index, entry in enumerate(entries):
        reference = _camt_reference(entry)
        amount_text = _camt_amount(entry)
        amount = _parse_amount(amount_text) if amount_text is not None else None
        if reference is None or amount is None:
            gap_signals.append(
                _gap(
                    skill_input.property_id,
                    skill_input.source_id,
                    f"camt053 entry {index} missing reference or amount",
                    "missing",
                )
            )
            continue
        direction = _camt_direction(entry)
        signed_amount = amount if direction == "credit" else -amount
        details = _camt_details(entry)
        facts.append(
            _bank_fact(
                property_id=skill_input.property_id,
                key=_normalize_reference(reference),
                value={
                    "reference": reference,
                    "booking_date": _camt_date(entry, "BookgDt"),
                    "value_date": _camt_date(entry, "ValDt"),
                    "amount_eur": str(signed_amount),
                    "currency": _camt_currency(entry),
                    "direction": direction,
                    "purpose": details["purpose"],
                    "counterparty": details["counterparty"],
                    "counterparty_iban": details["counterparty_iban"],
                    "status": _camt_status(entry),
                },
                locator=f"Ntry[{index}]",
                REDACTED,
                source_id=skill_input.source_id,
                source_uri=skill_input.source_uri,
                source_timestamp=skill_input.source_timestamp,
            )
        )
    return ExtractionResult(facts=facts, gap_signals=gap_signals)

class SPAStaticFiles(StaticFiles):
    """Static mount that falls back to index.html for unknown HTML paths (SPA routes)."""

    async def get_response(self, path: str, scope: Scope) -> Response:  # type: ignore[override]
        try:

from __future__ import annotations

from collections.abc import AsyncIterator
from contextlib import AsyncExitStack, asynccontextmanager
from http import HTTPStatus
from pathlib import Path

import structlog
from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.responses import RedirectResponse
from fastapi.staticfiles import StaticFiles
from starlette.exceptions import HTTPException as StarletteHTTPException
from starlette.responses import FileResponse, Response
from starlette.types import Lifespan, Scope

from app.api.v1.router import api_router
from app.core.config import REPO_ROOT, get_settings
from app.core.logging import configure_logging
from app.core.middleware import RequestIdMiddleware
from app.mcp import build_mcp
from app.mcp.orgs import install_allowlist
from app.plugin import install_active_plugin
from app.verticals.property_de import build_plugin as build_property_de_plugin

PRM_LOCAL_PATH = "/mcp/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource"

log = structlog.get_logger(__name__)


class SPAStaticFiles(StaticFiles):
    """Static mount that falls back to index.html for unknown HTML paths (SPA routes)."""

    async def get_response(self, path: str, scope: Scope) -> Response:  # type: ignore[override]
        try:
            return await super().get_response(path, scope)
        except StarletteHTTPException as exc:
            reserved_prefix = path in {"api", "mcp"} or path.startswith(("api/", "mcp/"))
            if (
                exc.status_code != HTTPStatus.NOT_FOUND
                or "." in path.rsplit("/", 1)[-1]
                or reserved_prefix
            ):
                raise
            directory = Path(str(self.directory)) if self.directory else None
            if directory is None:
                raise
            index = directory / "index.html"
            if not index.is_file():
                raise
            return FileResponse(index)


def _make_lifespan(child: Lifespan | None) -> Lifespan:
    @asynccontextmanager
    async def lifespan(app: FastAPI) -> AsyncIterator[None]:
        settings = get_settings()
        configure_logging(settings)
        log.info("startup", env=settings.env, version=app.version)
        async with AsyncExitStack() as stack:
            if child is not None:
                await stack.enter_async_context(child(app))
            yield
        log.info("shutdown")

    return lifespan


def create_app() -> FastAPI:
    settings = get_settings()

    mcp_app = None
    if settings.mcp_enabled:
        mcp_app = build_mcp(settings).http_app(path="/")

    app = FastAPI(
        title=settings.app_name,
        version=settings.version,
        lifespan=_make_lifespan(mcp_app.lifespan if mcp_app else None),
        docs_url="/docs" if settings.env != "prod" else None,
        redoc_url=None,
    )
    app.add_middleware(RequestIdMiddleware)
    app.include_router(api_router, prefix="/api/v1")
    if mcp_app is not None:

        @app.get("/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource", include_in_schema=False)
        @app.get("/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/mcp", include_in_schema=False)
        async def _prm_redirect() -> RedirectResponse:
            return RedirectResponse(url=PRM_LOCAL_PATH, status_code=307)

        app.mount("/mcp", mcp_app)
    static_dir = REPO_ROOT / "app" / "static"
    if static_dir.is_dir():
        app.mount("/", SPAStaticFiles(directory=static_dir, html=True), name="static")
    return app


app = create_app()

from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Annotated

from anyio.to_thread import run_sync
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends

from app.core.config import Settings, get_settings
from app.extract.models import Fact, FactStatus, SourceCitation
from app.ingest.envelope import Envelope
from app.render import collect_render_records, write_building_markdown
from app.schemas.ingest import IngestRequest, IngestResponse
from app.storage.facts import open_facts

router = APIRouter()


@router.post("", response_model=IngestResponse)
async def ingest_envelope(
    request: IngestRequest,
    settings: Annotated[Settings, Depends(get_settings)],
) -> IngestResponse:
    envelope_id = _envelope_id(request.envelope)
    fact = request.fact or _default_fact(request.envelope, envelope_id=envelope_id)

    def write_fact() -> tuple[str, str, list[dict[str, object]]]:
        store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
        fact_id = store.upsert_fact(
            fact_id=fact.fact_id,
            property_id=fact.property_id,
            section=fact.section,
            key=fact.key,
            value=fact.value,
            status=fact.status.value,
            supersedes_fact_id=fact.supersedes_fact_id,
            asserted_at=fact.asserted_at,
            valid_from=fact.valid_interval.start,
            valid_to=fact.valid_interval.end,
            source_id=fact.citation.source_id,
            source_kind=fact.citation.source_kind,
            source_locator=fact.citation.locator,
            source_excerpt=fact.citation.quote,
            source_timestamp=fact.citation.source_timestamp,
            content_hash=fact.citation.payload_hash,
            extractor="ingest.minimum",
            confidence=fact.confidence,
            idempotency_key=f"fact:{envelope_id}",
        )
        event_id = store.append_event(
            "envelope.ingested",
            request.envelope.model_dump(mode="json"),
            fact_id=fact_id,
            idempotency_key=f"event:{envelope_id}",
        )
        records = collect_render_records(store, fact.property_id)
        return fact_id, event_id, records

    fact_id, event_id, records = await run_sync(write_fact)
    await write_building_markdown(settings.output_dir, fact.property_id, records)
    return IngestResponse(envelope_id=envelope_id, fact_id=fact_id, event_id=event_id)


def _envelope_id(envelope: Envelope) -> str:
    return f"env_{envelope.payload_hash[:32].lower()}"


def _default_fact(envelope: Envelope, *, envelope_id: str) -> Fact:
    return Fact(
        property_id=envelope.property,
        section="ingest",
        key=f"{envelope.kind}-{envelope.payload_hash[:12].lower()}",
        value={
            "envelope_id": envelope_id,
            "source": envelope.source,
            "kind": envelope.kind,
            "content_type": envelope.content_type,
            "payload_uri": envelope.payload_uri,
        },
        citation=SourceCitation(
            source_id=envelope.source,
            source_kind=envelope.kind,
            source_uri=envelope.payload_uri,
            locator=envelope.payload_uri or envelope.payload_hash[:16].lower(),
            payload_hash=envelope.payload_hash,
        ),
        confidence=1.0,
        status=FactStatus.ACTIVE,
        asserted_at=envelope.received_at,
    )

from __future__ import annotations

from typing import cast

import anyio
from httpx import AsyncClient

from app.render import building_markdown_path
from app.storage.facts import open_facts

PAYLOAD_HASH = "b" * 64


def _request_body(payload_hash: str = PAYLOAD_HASH) -> dict[str, object]:
    return {
        "envelope": {
            "source": "stammdaten",
            "kind": "json",
            "org": "org-001",
            "property": "LIE-001",
            "content_type": "application/json",
            "payload_uri": "data/stammdaten/stammdaten.json",
            "payload_hash": payload_hash,
            "received_at": "2026-05-04T10:00:00Z",
        }
    }


async def test_ingest_writes_one_fact_row(client: AsyncClient, settings) -> None:
    response = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=_request_body())

    assert response.status_code == 200
    body = response.json()
    assert body["envelope_id"] == f"env_{PAYLOAD_HASH[:32]}"

    store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
    facts = store.list_facts()
    events = store.list_events()

    assert len(facts) == 1
    assert facts[0]["fact_id"] == body["fact_id"]
    assert facts[0]["property_id"] == "LIE-001"
    assert facts[0]["section"] == "ingest"
    assert facts[0]["source_kind"] == "json"
    assert [event["kind"] for event in events] == ["fact.asserted", "envelope.ingested"]
    envelope_event = next(event for event in events if event["kind"] == "envelope.ingested")
    assert envelope_event["event_id"] == body["event_id"]
    assert envelope_event["fact_id"] == body["fact_id"]


async def test_ingest_duplicate_payload_is_idempotent(client: AsyncClient, settings) -> None:
    first = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=_request_body())
    second = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=_request_body())

    assert first.status_code == 200
    assert second.status_code == 200
    assert second.json() == first.json()

    store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
    assert len(store.list_facts()) == 1
    assert [event["kind"] for event in store.list_events()] == [
        "fact.asserted",
        "envelope.ingested",
    ]


async def test_ingest_renders_building_markdown_for_property(
    client: AsyncClient,
    settings,
) -> None:
    response = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=_request_body())
    assert response.status_code == 200

    markdown_path = building_markdown_path(settings.output_dir, "LIE-001")
    text = await anyio.Path(markdown_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8")

    assert text.startswith("# Building LIE-001")
    assert "### Active Facts" in text
    assert "source: json:stammdaten" in text


async def test_ingest_rejects_bad_envelope_id(client: AsyncClient) -> None:
    body = _request_body()
    envelope = cast(dict[str, object], body["envelope"])
    envelope["property"] = "../etc/passwd"

    response = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=body)

    assert response.status_code == 422

from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Annotated

from anyio.to_thread import run_sync
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends

from app.core.config import Settings, get_settings
from app.extract.models import ExtractionResult, Fact, FactStatus, GapSignal, SourceCitation
from app.ingest.envelope import Envelope
from app.plugin import VerticalPlugin, get_active_plugin
from app.render import collect_render_records, write_building_markdown
from app.schemas.ingest import IngestRequest, IngestResponse
from app.storage.facts import FactsStore, open_facts

router = APIRouter()


@router.post("", response_model=IngestResponse)
async def ingest_envelope(
    request: IngestRequest,
    settings: Annotated[Settings, Depends(get_settings)],
) -> IngestResponse:
    plugin = get_active_plugin()
    envelope_id = _envelope_id(request.envelope)
    extraction = await _extract(request, plugin, envelope_id)
    facts = list(extraction.facts)
    gap_signals = list(extraction.gap_signals)
    property_id = facts[0].property_id if facts else request.envelope.property

    def commit() -> tuple[str, list[str], list[str], list[dict[str, object]]]:
        store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
        fact_ids = [
            _upsert_fact(store, fact, envelope_id=envelope_id, index=index)
            for index, fact in enumerate(facts)
        ]
        gap_event_ids = [
            _emit_gap_event(store, signal, envelope_id=envelope_id, index=index)
            for index, signal in enumerate(gap_signals)
        ]
        envelope_event_id = store.append_event(
            "envelope.ingested",
            request.envelope.model_dump(mode="json"),
            fact_id=fact_ids[0] if fact_ids else None,
            idempotency_key=f"event:{envelope_id}",
        )
        records = collect_render_records(store, property_id)
        return envelope_event_id, fact_ids, gap_event_ids, records

    envelope_event_id, fact_ids, gap_event_ids, records = await run_sync(commit)
    await write_building_markdown(settings.output_dir, property_id, records)
    return IngestResponse(
        envelope_id=envelope_id,
        event_id=envelope_event_id,
        fact_ids=fact_ids,
        gap_event_ids=gap_event_ids,
    )


async def _extract(
    request: IngestRequest,
    plugin: VerticalPlugin,
    envelope_id: str,
) -> ExtractionResult:
    if request.fact is not None:
        return ExtractionResult(facts=[request.fact])

    if request.payload is not None:
        extractor = plugin.extractors.get(request.envelope.kind)
        if extractor is not None:
            return await extractor.extract(request.envelope, request.payload)

    return ExtractionResult(facts=[_default_fact(request.envelope, envelope_id=envelope_id)])


def _envelope_id(envelope: Envelope) -> str:
    return f"env_{envelope.payload_hash[:32].lower()}"


def _upsert_fact(
    store: FactsStore,
    fact: Fact,
    *,
    envelope_id: str,
    index: int,
) -> str:
    return store.upsert_fact(
        fact_id=fact.fact_id,
        property_id=fact.property_id,
        section=fact.section,
        key=fact.key,
        value=fact.value,
        status=fact.status.value,
        supersedes_fact_id=fact.supersedes_fact_id,
        asserted_at=fact.asserted_at,
        valid_from=fact.valid_interval.start,
        valid_to=fact.valid_interval.end,
        source_id=fact.citation.source_id,
        source_kind=fact.citation.source_kind,
        source_locator=fact.citation.locator,
        source_excerpt=fact.citation.quote,
        source_timestamp=fact.citation.source_timestamp,
        content_hash=fact.citation.payload_hash,
        extractor="ingest.plugin",
        confidence=fact.confidence,
        idempotency_key=f"fact:{envelope_id}:{index:04d}",
    )


def _emit_gap_event(
    store: FactsStore,
    signal: GapSignal,
    *,
    envelope_id: str,
    index: int,
) -> str:
    return store.append_event(
        "gap_signal",
        signal.model_dump(mode="json"),
        idempotency_key=f"gap:{envelope_id}:{index:04d}",
    )


def _default_fact(envelope: Envelope, *, envelope_id: str) -> Fact:
    return Fact(
        property_id=envelope.property,
        section="ingest",
        key=f"{envelope.kind}-{envelope.payload_hash[:12].lower()}",
        value={
            "envelope_id": envelope_id,
            "source": envelope.source,
            "kind": envelope.kind,
            "content_type": envelope.content_type,
            "payload_uri": envelope.payload_uri,
        },
        citation=SourceCitation(
            source_id=envelope.source,
            source_kind=envelope.kind,
            source_uri=envelope.payload_uri,
            locator=envelope.payload_uri or envelope.payload_hash[:16].lower(),
            payload_hash=envelope.payload_hash,
        ),
        confidence=1.0,
        status=FactStatus.ACTIVE,
        asserted_at=envelope.received_at,
    )

from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Annotated

from anyio.to_thread import run_sync
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends

from app.core.config import Settings, get_settings
from app.extract.models import Fact, FactStatus, SourceCitation
from app.ingest.envelope import Envelope
from app.render import collect_render_records, write_building_markdown
from app.schemas.ingest import IngestRequest, IngestResponse
from app.storage.facts import open_facts

router = APIRouter()


@router.post("", response_model=IngestResponse)
async def ingest_envelope(
    request: IngestRequest,
    settings: Annotated[Settings, Depends(get_settings)],
) -> IngestResponse:
    envelope_id = _envelope_id(request.envelope)
    fact = request.fact or _default_fact(request.envelope, envelope_id=envelope_id)

    def write_fact() -> tuple[str, str, list[dict[str, object]]]:
        store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
        fact_id = store.upsert_fact(
            fact_id=fact.fact_id,
            property_id=fact.property_id,
            section=fact.section,
            key=fact.key,
            value=fact.value,
            status=fact.status.value,
            supersedes_fact_id=fact.supersedes_fact_id,
            asserted_at=fact.asserted_at,
            valid_from=fact.valid_interval.start,
            valid_to=fact.valid_interval.end,
            source_id=fact.citation.source_id,
            source_kind=fact.citation.source_kind,
            source_locator=fact.citation.locator,
            source_excerpt=fact.citation.quote,
            source_timestamp=fact.citation.source_timestamp,
            content_hash=fact.citation.payload_hash,
            extractor="ingest.minimum",
            confidence=fact.confidence,
            idempotency_key=f"fact:{envelope_id}",
        )
        event_id = store.append_event(
            "envelope.ingested",
            request.envelope.model_dump(mode="json"),
            fact_id=fact_id,
            idempotency_key=f"event:{envelope_id}",
        )
        records = collect_render_records(store, fact.property_id)
        return fact_id, event_id, records

    fact_id, event_id, records = await run_sync(write_fact)
    await write_building_markdown(settings.output_dir, fact.property_id, records)
    return IngestResponse(envelope_id=envelope_id, fact_id=fact_id, event_id=event_id)


def _envelope_id(envelope: Envelope) -> str:
    return f"env_{envelope.payload_hash[:32].lower()}"


def _default_fact(envelope: Envelope, *, envelope_id: str) -> Fact:
    return Fact(
        property_id=envelope.property,
        section="ingest",
        key=f"{envelope.kind}-{envelope.payload_hash[:12].lower()}",
        value={
            "envelope_id": envelope_id,
            "source": envelope.source,
            "kind": envelope.kind,
            "content_type": envelope.content_type,
            "payload_uri": envelope.payload_uri,
        },
        citation=SourceCitation(
            source_id=envelope.source,
            source_kind=envelope.kind,
            source_uri=envelope.payload_uri,
            locator=envelope.payload_uri or envelope.payload_hash[:16].lower(),
            payload_hash=envelope.payload_hash,
        ),
        confidence=1.0,
        status=FactStatus.ACTIVE,
        asserted_at=envelope.received_at,
    )

from __future__ import annotations

import json
from pathlib import Path
from typing import cast

import anyio
from httpx import AsyncClient

from app.render import building_markdown_path
from app.storage.facts import open_facts

PAYLOAD_HASH = "b" * 64
STAMMDATEN_HASH = "e" * 64
STAMMDATEN_PATH = (
    Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] / "data" / "stammdaten" / "stammdaten.json"
)


def _request_body(payload_hash: str = PAYLOAD_HASH) -> dict[str, object]:
    return {
        "envelope": {
            "source": "stammdaten",
            "kind": "json",
            "org": "org_demo_berlin",
            "property": "LIE-001",
            "content_type": "application/json",
            "payload_uri": "data/stammdaten/stammdaten.json",
            "payload_hash": payload_hash,
            "received_at": "2026-05-04T10:00:00Z",
        }
    }


async def test_ingest_writes_one_fact_row(client: AsyncClient, settings) -> None:
    response = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=_request_body())

    assert response.status_code == 200
    body = response.json()
    assert body["envelope_id"] == f"env_{PAYLOAD_HASH[:32]}"
    assert len(body["fact_ids"]) == 1
    assert body["gap_event_ids"] == []

    store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
    facts = store.list_facts()
    events = store.list_events()

    assert len(facts) == 1
    assert facts[0]["fact_id"] == body["fact_ids"][0]
    assert facts[0]["property_id"] == "LIE-001"
    assert facts[0]["section"] == "ingest"
    assert facts[0]["source_kind"] == "json"
    assert [event["kind"] for event in events] == ["fact.asserted", "envelope.ingested"]
    envelope_event = next(event for event in events if event["kind"] == "envelope.ingested")
    assert envelope_event["event_id"] == body["event_id"]
    assert envelope_event["fact_id"] == body["fact_ids"][0]


async def test_ingest_duplicate_payload_is_idempotent(client: AsyncClient, settings) -> None:
    first = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=_request_body())
    second = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=_request_body())

    assert first.status_code == 200
    assert second.status_code == 200
    assert second.json() == first.json()

    store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
    assert len(store.list_facts()) == 1
    assert [event["kind"] for event in store.list_events()] == [
        "fact.asserted",
        "envelope.ingested",
    ]


async def test_ingest_renders_building_markdown_for_property(
    client: AsyncClient,
    settings,
) -> None:
    response = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=_request_body())
    assert response.status_code == 200

    markdown_path = building_markdown_path(settings.output_dir, "LIE-001")
    text = await anyio.Path(markdown_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8")

    assert text.startswith("# Building LIE-001")
    assert "### Active Facts" in text
    assert "source: json:stammdaten" in text


async def test_ingest_with_payload_uses_vertical_extractor(
    client: AsyncClient,
    settings,
) -> None:
    payload = json.loads(STAMMDATEN_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    body = _request_body(STAMMDATEN_HASH)
    envelope = cast(dict[str, object], body["envelope"])
    envelope["kind"] = "stammdaten"
    body["payload"] = payload

    response = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=body)

    assert response.status_code == 200
    data = response.json()
    assert len(data["fact_ids"]) > 5

    store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
    sections = {fact["section"] for fact in store.list_facts()}
    assert {"property", "contacts", "finance", "buildings", "units"}.issubset(sections)

    markdown = await anyio.Path(
        building_markdown_path(settings.output_dir, "LIE-001"),
    ).read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    assert "## Property" in markdown
    assert "## Buildings" in markdown


async def test_ingest_rejects_bad_envelope_id(client: AsyncClient) -> None:
    body = _request_body()
    envelope = cast(dict[str, object], body["envelope"])
    envelope["property"] = "../etc/passwd"

    response = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=body)

    assert response.status_code == 422

    assert second.json() == first.json()

    store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
    assert len(store.list_facts()) == 1
    assert [event["kind"] for event in store.list_events()] == [
        "fact.asserted",
        "envelope.ingested",
    ]


async def test_ingest_renders_building_markdown_for_property(
    client: AsyncClient,
    settings,
) -> None:
    response = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=_request_body())
    assert response.status_code == 200

    markdown_path = building_markdown_path(settings.output_dir, "LIE-001")
    text = await anyio.Path(markdown_path).read_text(encoding="utf-8")

    assert text.startswith("# Building LIE-001")
    assert "### Active Facts" in text
    assert "source: json:stammdaten" in text


async def test_ingest_rejects_bad_envelope_id(client: AsyncClient) -> None:
    body = _request_body()
    envelope = cast(dict[str, object], body["envelope"])
    envelope["property"] = "../etc/passwd"

    response = await client.post("/api/v1/ingest", json=body)

    assert response.status_code == 422

from __future__ import annotations

from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field, JsonValue

from app.extract.models import Fact
from app.ingest.envelope import Envelope


class IngestRequest(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(extra="forbid")

    envelope: Envelope
    fact: Fact | None = None
    payload: JsonValue | None = None


class IngestResponse(BaseModel):
    envelope_id: str
    event_id: str
    fact_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
    gap_event_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)

1	from __future__ import annotations
2	
3	from typing import Annotated
4	
5	from anyio.to_thread import run_sync
6	from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
7	
8	from app.core.config import Settings, get_settings
9	from app.extract.models import ExtractionResult, Fact, FactStatus, GapSignal, SourceCitation
10	from app.ingest.envelope import Envelope
11	from app.plugin import VerticalPlugin, get_active_plugin
12	from app.render import collect_render_records, write_building_markdown
13	from app.schemas.ingest import IngestRequest, IngestResponse
14	from app.storage.facts import FactsStore, open_facts
15	
16	router = APIRouter()
17	
18	
19	@router.post("", response_model=IngestResponse)
20	async def ingest_envelope(
21	    request: IngestRequest,
22	    settings: Annotated[Settings, Depends(get_settings)],
23	) -> IngestResponse:
24	    plugin = get_active_plugin()
25	    envelope_id = _envelope_id(request.envelope)
26	    extraction = await _extract(request, plugin, envelope_id)
27	    facts = list(extraction.facts)
28	    gap_signals = list(extraction.gap_signals)
29	    property_id = facts[0].property_id if facts else request.envelope.property
30	
31	    def commit() -> tuple[str, list[str], list[str], list[dict[str, object]]]:
32	        store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
33	        fact_ids = [
34	            _upsert_fact(store, fact, envelope_id=envelope_id, index=index)
35	            for index, fact in enumerate(facts)
36	        ]
37	        gap_event_ids = [
38	            _emit_gap_event(store, signal, envelope_id=envelope_id, index=index)
39	            for index, signal in enumerate(gap_signals)
40	        ]
41	        envelope_event_id = store.append_event(
42	            "envelope.ingested",
43	            request.envelope.model_dump(mode="json"),
44	            fact_id=fact_ids[0] if fact_ids else None,
45	            idempotency_key=f"event:{envelope_id}",
46	        )
47	        records = collect_render_records(store, property_id)
48	        return envelope_event_id, fact_ids, gap_event_ids, records
49	
50	    envelope_event_id, fact_ids, gap_event_ids, records = await run_sync(commit)
51	    await write_building_markdown(settings.output_dir, property_id, records)
52	    return IngestResponse(
53	        envelope_id=envelope_id,
54	        event_id=envelope_event_id,
55	        fact_ids=fact_ids,
56	        gap_event_ids=gap_event_ids,
57	    )
58	
59	
60	async def _extract(
61	    request: IngestRequest,
62	    plugin: VerticalPlugin,
63	    envelope_id: str,
64	) -> ExtractionResult:
65	    if request.fact is not None:
66	        return ExtractionResult(facts=[request.fact])
67	
68	    if request.payload is not None:
69	        extractor = plugin.extractors.get(request.envelope.kind)
70	        if extractor is not None:
71	            return await extractor.extract(request.envelope, request.payload)
72	
73	    return ExtractionResult(facts=[_default_fact(request.envelope, envelope_id=envelope_id)])
74	
75	
76	def _envelope_id(envelope: Envelope) -> str:
77	    return f"env_{envelope.payload_hash[:32].lower()}"
78	
79	
80	def _upsert_fact(
81	    store: FactsStore,
82	    fact: Fact,
83	    *,
84	    envelope_id: str,
85	    index: int,
86	) -> str:
87	    return store.upsert_fact(
88	        fact_id=fact.fact_id,
89	        property_id=fact.property_id,
90	        section=fact.section,
91	        key=fact.key,
92	        value=fact.value,
93	        status=fact.status.value,
94	        supersedes_fact_id=fact.supersedes_fact_id,
95	        asserted_at=fact.asserted_at,
96	        valid_from=fact.valid_interval.start,
97	        valid_to=fact.valid_interval.end,
98	        source_id=fact.citation.source_id,
99	        source_kind=fact.citation.source_kind,
100	        source_locator=fact.citation.locator,
101	        source_excerpt=fact.citation.quote,
102	        source_timestamp=fact.citation.source_timestamp,
103	        content_hash=fact.citation.payload_hash,
104	        extractor="ingest.plugin",
105	        confidence=fact.confidence,
106	        idempotency_key=f"fact:{envelope_id}:{index:04d}",
107	    )
108	
109	
110	def _emit_gap_event(
111	    store: FactsStore,
112	    signal: GapSignal,
113	    *,
114	    envelope_id: str,
115	    index: int,
116	) -> str:
117	    return store.append_event(
118	        "gap_signal",
119	        signal.model_dump(mode="json"),
120	        idempotency_key=f"gap:{envelope_id}:{index:04d}",
121	    )
122	
123	
124	def _default_fact(envelope: Envelope, *, envelope_id: str) -> Fact:
125	    return Fact(
126	        property_id=envelope.property,
127	        section="ingest",
128	        key=f"{envelope.kind}-{envelope.payload_hash[:12].lower()}",
129	        value={
130	            "envelope_id": envelope_id,
131	            "source": envelope.source,
132	            "kind": envelope.kind,
133	            "content_type": envelope.content_type,
134	            "payload_uri": envelope.payload_uri,
135	        },
136	        citation=SourceCitation(
137	            source_id=envelope.source,
138	            source_kind=envelope.kind,
139	            source_uri=envelope.payload_uri,
140	            locator=envelope.payload_uri or envelope.payload_hash[:16].lower(),
141	            payload_hash=envelope.payload_hash,
142	        ),
143	        confidence=1.0,
144	        status=FactStatus.ACTIVE,
145	        asserted_at=envelope.received_at,
146	    )
147

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends

from app.core.config import Settings, get_settings
from app.extract.models import ExtractionResult, Fact, FactStatus, GapSignal, SourceCitation
from app.ingest.envelope import Envelope
from app.plugin import VerticalPlugin, get_active_plugin
from app.render import collect_render_records, write_building_markdown
from app.schemas.ingest import IngestRequest, IngestResponse
from app.storage.facts import FactsStore, open_facts

router = APIRouter()


@router.post("", response_model=IngestResponse)
async def ingest_envelope(
    request: IngestRequest,
    settings: Annotated[Settings, Depends(get_settings)],
) -> IngestResponse:
    plugin = get_active_plugin()
    envelope_id = _envelope_id(request.envelope)
    extraction = await _extract(request, plugin, envelope_id)
    facts = list(extraction.facts)
    gap_signals = list(extraction.gap_signals)
    property_id = facts[0].property_id if facts else request.envelope.property

    def commit() -> tuple[str, list[str], list[str], list[dict[str, object]]]:
        store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
        fact_ids = [
            _upsert_fact(store, fact, envelope_id=envelope_id, index=index)
            for index, fact in enumerate(facts)
        ]
        gap_event_ids = [
            _emit_gap_event(store, signal, envelope_id=envelope_id, index=index)
            for index, signal in enumerate(gap_signals)
        ]
        envelope_event_id = store.append_event(
            "envelope.ingested",
            request.envelope.model_dump(mode="json"),
            fact_id=fact_ids[0] if fact_ids else None,
            idempotency_key=f"event:{envelope_id}",
        )
        records = collect_render_records(store, property_id)
        return envelope_event_id, fact_ids, gap_event_ids, records

    envelope_event_id, fact_ids, gap_event_ids, records = await run_sync(commit)
    await write_building_markdown(settings.output_dir, property_id, records)
    return IngestResponse(
        envelope_id=envelope_id,
        event_id=envelope_event_id,
        fact_ids=fact_ids,
        gap_event_ids=gap_event_ids,
    )


async def _extract(
    request: IngestRequest,
    plugin: VerticalPlugin,
    envelope_id: str,
) -> ExtractionResult:
    if request.fact is not None:
        return ExtractionResult(facts=[request.fact])

    if request.payload is not None:
        extractor = plugin.extractors.get(request.envelope.kind)
        if extractor is not None:
            return await extractor.extract(request.envelope, request.payload)

    return ExtractionResult(facts=[_default_fact(request.envelope, envelope_id=envelope_id)])


def _envelope_id(envelope: Envelope) -> str:
    return f"env_{envelope.payload_hash[:32].lower()}"


def _upsert_fact(
    store: FactsStore,
    fact: Fact,
    *,
    envelope_id: str,
    index: int,
) -> str:
    return store.upsert_fact(
        fact_id=fact.fact_id,
        property_id=fact.property_id,
        section=fact.section,
        key=fact.key,
        value=fact.value,
        status=fact.status.value,
        supersedes_fact_id=fact.supersedes_fact_id,
        asserted_at=fact.asserted_at,
        valid_from=fact.valid_interval.start,
        valid_to=fact.valid_interval.end,
        source_id=fact.citation.source_id,
        source_kind=fact.citation.source_kind,
        source_locator=fact.citation.locator,
        source_excerpt=fact.citation.quote,
        source_timestamp=fact.citation.source_timestamp,
        content_hash=fact.citation.payload_hash,
        extractor="ingest.plugin",
        confidence=fact.confidence,
        idempotency_key=f"fact:{envelope_id}:{index:04d}",
    )


def _emit_gap_event(
    store: FactsStore,
    signal: GapSignal,
    *,
    envelope_id: str,
    index: int,
) -> str:
    return store.append_event(
        "gap_signal",
        signal.model_dump(mode="json"),
        idempotency_key=f"gap:{envelope_id}:{index:04d}",
    )


def _default_fact(envelope: Envelope, *, envelope_id: str) -> Fact:
    return Fact(
        property_id=envelope.property,
        section="ingest",
        key=f"{envelope.kind}-{envelope.payload_hash[:12].lower()}",
        value={
            "envelope_id": envelope_id,
            "source": envelope.source,
            "kind": envelope.kind,
            "content_type": envelope.content_type,
            "payload_uri": envelope.payload_uri,
        },
        citation=SourceCitation(
            source_id=envelope.source,
            source_kind=envelope.kind,
            source_uri=envelope.payload_uri,
            locator=envelope.payload_uri or envelope.payload_hash[:16].lower(),
            payload_hash=envelope.payload_hash,
        ),
        confidence=1.0,
        status=FactStatus.ACTIVE,
        asserted_at=envelope.received_at,
    )

async def _collect_observations(
    plugin: VerticalPlugin,
    facts: list[Fact],
) -> list[ObservedEvent]:
    if not plugin.observers or not facts:
        return []
    observed: list[ObservedEvent] = []
    for observer in plugin.observers:
        for fact in facts:
            for event in await observer.observe("fact.extracted", fact):
                observed.append(event)
    return observed

    observations = await _collect_observations(plugin, facts)
    property_id = facts[0].property_id if facts else request.envelope.property

    def commit() -> tuple[str, list[str], list[str], list[str], list[dict[str, object]]]:
        store = open_facts(settings.output_dir / "facts.duckdb")
        fact_ids = [
            _upsert_fact(store, fact, envelope_id=envelope_id, index=index)
            for index, fact in enumerate(facts)
        ]
        gap_event_ids = [
            _emit_gap_event(store, signal, envelope_id=envelope_id, index=index)
            for index, signal in enumerate(gap_signals)
        ]
        observation_event_ids = [
            _emit_observed_event(store, observed, envelope_id=envelope_id, index=index)
            for index, observed in enumerate(observations)
        ]
        envelope_event_id = store.append_event(
            "envelope.ingested",
            request.envelope.model_dump(mode="json"),
            fact_id=fact_ids[0] if fact_ids else None,
            idempotency_key=f"event:{envelope_id}",
        )
        records = collect_render_records(store, property_id)
        return envelope_event_id, fact_ids, gap_event_ids, observation_event_ids, records

    (
        envelope_event_id,
        fact_ids,
        gap_event_ids,
        observation_event_ids,
        records,
    ) = await run_sync(commit)
    await write_building_markdown(settings.output_dir, property_id, records)
    return IngestResponse(
        envelope_id=envelope_id,
        event_id=envelope_event_id,
        fact_ids=fact_ids,
        gap_event_ids=gap_event_ids,
        observation_event_ids=observation_event_ids,
    )


async def _collect_observations(
    plugin: VerticalPlugin,
    facts: list[Fact],
) -> list[ObservedEvent]:
    if not plugin.observers or not facts:
        return []
    observed: list[ObservedEvent] = []
    for observer in plugin.observers:
        for fact in facts:
            for event in await observer.observe("fact.extracted", fact):
                observed.append(event)
    return observed


async def _extract(
    request: IngestRequest,
    plugin: VerticalPlugin,
    envelope_id: str,
) -> ExtractionResult:
    if request.fact is not None:
        return ExtractionResult(facts=[request.fact])

    if request.payload is not None:
        extractor = plugin.extractors.get(request.envelope.kind)
        if extractor is not None:
            return await extractor.extract(request.envelope, request.payload)

    return ExtractionResult(facts=[_default_fact(request.envelope, envelope_id=envelope_id)])


def _envelope_id(envelope: Envelope) -> str:
    return f"env_{envelope.payload_hash[:32].lower()}"


def _upsert_fact(
    store: FactsStore,
    fact: Fact,
    *,
    envelope_id: str,
    index: int,
) -> str:
    return store.upsert_fact(
        fact_id=fact.fact_id,
        property_id=fact.property_id,
        section=fact.section,
        key=fact.key,
        value=fact.value,
        status=fact.status.value,
        supersedes_fact_id=fact.supersedes_fact_id,
        asserted_at=fact.asserted_at,
        valid_from=fact.valid_interval.start,
        valid_to=fact.valid_interval.end,
        source_id=fact.citation.source_id,
        source_kind=fact.citation.source_kind,
        source_locator=fact.citation.locator,
        source_excerpt=fact.citation.quote,
        source_timestamp=fact.citation.source_timestamp,
        content_hash=fact.citation.payload_hash,
        extractor="ingest.plugin",
        confidence=fact.confidence,
        idempotency_key=f"fact:{envelope_id}:{index:04d}",
    )


def _emit_gap_event(
    store: FactsStore,
    signal: GapSignal,
    *,
    envelope_id: str,
    index: int,
) -> str:
    return store.append_event(
        "gap_signal",
        signal.model_dump(mode="json"),
        idempotency_key=f"gap:{envelope_id}:{index:04d}",
    )


def _default_fact(envelope: Envelope, *, envelope_id: str) -> Fact:
    return Fact(
        property_id=envelope.property,
        section="ingest",
        key=f"{envelope.kind}-{envelope.payload_hash[:12].lower()}",
        value={
            "envelope_id": envelope_id,
            "source": envelope.source,
            "kind": envelope.kind,
            "content_type": envelope.content_type,
            "payload_uri": envelope.payload_uri,
        },
        citation=SourceCitation(
            source_id=envelope.source,
            source_kind=envelope.kind,
            source_uri=envelope.payload_uri,
            locator=envelope.payload_uri or envelope.payload_hash[:16].lower(),
            payload_hash=envelope.payload_hash,
        ),
        confidence=1.0,
        status=FactStatus.ACTIVE,
        asserted_at=envelope.received_at,
    )

from __future__ import annotations

from app.extract.models import Fact, FactStatus, SourceCitation
from app.verticals.property_de.observers import (
    KnownSectionsObserver,
    LegalMapObserver,
    build_observers,
)

CITATION = SourceCitation(source_id="src-1", source_kind="stammdaten")


def _fact(section: str, key: str, value: object | None = None) -> Fact:
    return Fact(
        property_id="LIE-001",
        section=section,
        key=key,
        value=value if value is not None else {"x": 1},
        citation=CITATION,
        confidence=1.0,
        status=FactStatus.ACTIVE,
    )


async def test_known_sections_observer_emits_vocab_gap_for_unknown_section() -> None:
    events = list(
        await KnownSectionsObserver().observe(
            "fact.extracted",
            _fact("playground", "swing"),
        )
    )

    assert len(events) == 1
    event = events[0]
    assert event.kind == "vocab_gap"
    assert event.payload["section"] == "playground"
    assert event.idempotency_key == "vocab:LIE-001:playground"


async def test_known_sections_observer_silent_for_known_section() -> None:
    events = await KnownSectionsObserver().observe(
        "fact.extracted",
        _fact("contacts", "manager", {"name": "X"}),
    )

    assert events == ()


async def test_legal_map_observer_emits_legal_gap_for_missing_required_fields() -> None:
    events = list(
        await LegalMapObserver().observe(
            "fact.extracted",
            _fact("obligations", "tuev", {"deadline": None}),
        )
    )

    assert len(events) == 1
    event = events[0]
    assert event.kind == "legal_gap"
    assert event.payload["missing"] == ["deadline", "responsible"]


async def test_legal_map_observer_silent_when_required_present() -> None:
    events = await LegalMapObserver().observe(
        "fact.extracted",
        _fact(
            "obligations",
            "tuev",
            {"deadline": "2026-09-01", "responsible": "Hausverwaltung"},
        ),
    )

    assert events == ()


async def test_build_observers_returns_full_set() -> None:
    observers = build_observers()

    assert len(observers) == 2
    assert any(isinstance(observer, KnownSectionsObserver) for observer in observers)
    assert any(isinstance(observer, LegalMapObserver) for observer in observers)

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# AGENTS.md — PropContext

Cross-tool memory file for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and any other agent. Source of truth for design pattern and code style. **Keep current.** When patterns change, update this file in the same commit.

> `CLAUDE.md` is a symlink to this file. Do not duplicate.

---

## What this repo is

Living building memory for property management (German WEG domain). Pipeline ingests emails / invoices / bank tx / `stammdaten.json`, compresses into one `building.md` per property. External AI agent fetches `building.md` over HTTP. Full PRD: `PRD_Overview`. Hackathon scope: 48h MVP.

## Tech stack (2026-04 baseline)

| Layer | Choice | Version |
|---|---|---|
| Runtime | Python | 3.13+ |
| Pkg/env | uv | 0.11+ |
| API | FastAPI + uvicorn | 0.136.1 |
| Validation | Pydantic v2 | 2.13+ |
| Settings | pydantic-settings | 2.14+ |
| Logging | structlog | 25+ |
| HTTP client | httpx (async) | 0.28+ |
| Async fs | anyio | 4.7+ |
| Lint+format | ruff | 0.15+ |
| Type check | ty (Astral) | 0.0.32+ |
| Test | pytest + pytest-asyncio | 9 / 1.3 |
| Container | Docker (multi-stage, uv) | 29+ |

Do not add libraries without first comparing 2-3 alternatives in chat and getting human sign-off. The ecosystem moves fast; "the classic choice" is usually wrong.

## Layout

```
app/
  main.py              # create_app(), lifespan, mounts /mcp
  api/v1/
    router.py          # mounts feature routers
    health.py
    buildings.py
  core/
    config.py          # Settings, get_settings (lru_cache)
    logging.py         # configure_logging
  mcp/                 # FastMCP server exposed at /mcp (org-scoped, OAuth via WorkOS)
    server.py          # build_mcp(settings) → FastMCP
    auth.py            # AuthKitProvider wiring
    context.py         # current_org_id, assert_property_access (per-call)
    orgs.py            # hardcoded org → property allowlist
    tools.py / resources.py / prompts.py
  schemas/             # Pydantic response/request models, no business logic
  services/            # business logic, IO, integrations
tests/
  conftest.py          # AsyncClient fixture, dependency_overrides
  test_*.py
data/                  # raw source dataset (read-only)
schema/                # extraction prompts + WIKI_SCHEMA
output/                # building.md files (written by pipeline, served by API)
```

Rule: `api/` knows about `services/`, never the reverse. `services/` knows about external IO + `core/`. `schemas/` is leaf — imports nothing project-internal except other schemas.

## Code style (non-negotiable)

1. **`from __future__ import annotations` at the top of every `.py`** (except `__init__.py` if empty).
2. **Modern types only.** `list[str]` not `List[str]`. `X | None` not `Optional[X]`. `dict[K, V]` not `Dict`. No `typing.Tuple/List/Dict/Optional/Union` imports.
3. **Async by default for routes and IO services.** Blocking IO inside async = bug. Use `anyio` (or `asyncio.to_thread` for CPU-light blocking calls). No `requests` — `httpx.AsyncClient` only.
4. **Lifespan, not `@app.on_event`.** `on_event` is deprecated.
5. **Annotated DI.** Routes take `param: Annotated[T, Depends(provider)]`. Never bare `Depends()` in default arg.
6. **Pydantic v2 idioms.** `model_config = SettingsConfigDict(...)` / `ConfigDict(...)`. No nested `class Config`. Use `Field(default=...)`, not mutable defaults.
7. **Settings are immutable + cached.** One `get_settings()` `@lru_cache(maxsize=1)` factory. Routes get `Settings` only via `Depends(get_settings)` — never import the singleton.
8. **Structured logs only.** `log = structlog.get_logger(__name__)`. `log.info("event", key=value)`. No f-strings in log messages, no `print`.
9. **Errors raise `HTTPException`** with explicit status. Don't return error dicts.
10. **One `create_app()` factory.** Module-level `app = create_app()` is the ASGI entrypoint. No global mutation after import.
11. **Path validation at the edge.** Building IDs / user input go through Pydantic constraints (`Path(pattern=...)`, `StringConstraints`) before touching the filesystem. Never `Path(user_input)` raw.
12. **No comments stating *what*** the code does. Comment only the non-obvious *why*. Docstrings on public service classes/functions only.

## Patterns

### Adding a route

1. New module in `app/api/v1/<feature>.py` exposing `router = APIRouter()`.
2. Register in `app/api/v1/router.py` with `prefix=` and `tags=`.
3. Pydantic response model in `app/schemas/<feature>.py`.
4. Business logic in `app/services/<feature>.py` with a `get_<feature>_service()` Depends provider.
5. Test in `tests/test_<feature>.py` using the `client` fixture.

### Adding a setting

1. Field on `Settings` in `app/core/config.py` with type + default.
2. Document in `.env.example` (create when first needed).
3. Override in tests via the `settings` fixture / `dependency_overrides`.

### Adding a dependency

```bash
uv add <pkg>            # runtime
uv add --group dev <pkg> # dev/test
```

Pin a sane lower bound (`>=X.Y`). Never pin exact (`==`) except for security CVEs.

### Adding an MCP capability

1. Tool → `app/mcp/tools.py`. Use `assert_property_access(property_id)` at the top to enforce org scope. Raise `ToolError` for user-facing failure.
2. Resource → `app/mcp/resources.py`. Same access gate. URIs use `property://<id>` / `building://<prop>/<bld>` shape.
3. Prompt → `app/mcp/prompts.py`. Pure functions, no IO.
4. Org → property mapping is hardcoded in `app/mcp/orgs.py` for the MVP. When this moves to a database, the access gate stays the same — only `properties_for_org` changes.
5. Auth provider lives in `app/mcp/auth.py`. WorkOS AuthKit is the only supported AS today; swapping providers means changing this file alone (FastMCP `RemoteAuthProvider` contract).
6. Never read the bearer token directly. Use `app.mcp.context.current_org_id()` / `assert_property_access()` so per-call auth state is sourced from FastMCP's request context.

## Commands

```bash
# Install / sync env
uv sync

# Dev server (hot reload, structured console logs)
uv run fastapi dev app/main.py

# Prod-ish (no reload)
uv run fastapi run app/main.py

# Tests
uv run pytest
uv run pytest -k buildings -vv

# Lint / format / fix
uv run ruff check .
uv run ruff format .
uv run ruff check --fix .

# Types
uv run ty check
```

CI gate (when added) must run, in order: `ruff format --check`, `ruff check`, `ty check`, `pytest`.

### Docker

```bash
# Prod image (multi-stage, runs as non-root, healthcheck on /api/v1/health)
docker build -t propcontext:latest .
docker run --rm -p 8000:8000 propcontext:latest

# Compose — prod profile (default)
docker compose up --build

# Compose — dev profile (hot reload, source-mounted)
docker compose --profile dev up --build api-dev
```

Image conventions:
- Builder stage uses `ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:python3.13-bookworm-slim`, `uv sync --frozen --no-dev`.
- Runtime is `python:3.13-slim-bookworm`, copies only `/app/.venv` + `app/`. No uv at runtime.
- Runs as uid 1000 (`app` user). Never run as root.
- `output/` is a volume — `building.md` files persist across container restarts; never bake them into the image.
- Settings read env vars with `APP_` prefix: `APP_ENV`, `APP_LOG_LEVEL`, `APP_OUTPUT_DIR`, etc.

## Test conventions

- `pytest-asyncio` in `auto` mode — async tests don't need `@pytest.mark.asyncio`.
- HTTP tests use `httpx.AsyncClient` with `ASGITransport(app=app)`. No live network.
- Override deps via `app.dependency_overrides[get_settings] = lambda: settings` in fixture, `clear()` in teardown.
- One assertion concept per test. Use `tmp_path` for filesystem.
- Security tests: every endpoint that accepts a path/id needs a "rejects bad id" test.

## Don'ts

- No `print()` anywhere. Use structlog.
- No `requests`, `urllib`. Use `httpx`.
- No `os.path`. Use `pathlib.Path` (sync) or `anyio.Path` (async).
- No `datetime.utcnow()`. Use `datetime.now(UTC)`.
- No global mutable state. State lives behind `Depends()` providers.
- No business logic in route functions — push to `services/`.
- No silent `except: pass`. Catch narrowly, log with context, re-raise or return typed error.
- No `Any` unless boundary-justified (and `# noqa` with reason).

## When this file goes stale

If you add a pattern, drop a pattern, change a tool, or notice the rules drifting from the code: update this file *in the same PR*. Stale agent docs are worse than none.

## Pointers

- Product spec: `PRD_Overview`
- Schema architecture: `schema/WIKI_SCHEMA.md` (canonical; see §15 per-section metadata, §16 Archive-First two tiers, §17 Hermes pointer, §18 decisions log)
- Wiki maintainer system contract: `schema/CLAUDE.md`
- Hermes self-improvement loop: `schema/HERMES_LOOP.md` (inner skill loop + outer schema loop, JSONL substrate)
- Controlled vocabulary: `schema/VOCABULARY.md` (Patcher validates every keyed value against this)
- German legal map: `schema/LEGAL_MAP.md` (WEG / BauO Bln / BGB / BetrSichV / DSGVO obligations)
- Raw data: `data/` (read-only)
- Problem brief: `PROBLEM_STATEMENT.md`
- Inspiration: `INSPIRATION.md` (Karpathy `llm-wiki` source pattern)
- Container: `Dockerfile`, `docker-compose.yml`, `.dockerignore`
- Decision log (incl. ideas borrowed/rejected from earlier `template_index.md` / `INDEX_README.md` proposals): `schema/WIKI_SCHEMA.md §18`. The proposal files themselves were removed once their content was absorbed.

from __future__ import annotations

import hashlib
from collections.abc import Mapping
from typing import Annotated, Protocol

import anyio
import httpx
import structlog
from fastapi import Depends

from app.core.config import REPO_ROOT, Settings, get_settings

log = structlog.get_logger(__name__)


class LLMClient(Protocol):
    async def complete(self, *, model: str, system_prompt: str, user_prompt: str) -> str:
        """Return raw model text for a single prompt."""


def prompt_hash(prompt: str) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(prompt.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()


class AnthropicClient:
    """Minimal Anthropic Messages API client used behind the LLMClient protocol."""

    def __init__(
        self,
        *,
        api_key: str,
        timeout: float = 60.0,
        base_url: str = "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",
    ) -> None:
        self._api_key = api_key
        self._timeout = timeout
        self._base_url = base_url

    async def complete(self, *, model: str, system_prompt: str, user_prompt: str) -> str:
        headers = {
            "x-api-key": self._api_key,
            "anthropic-version": "2023-06-01",
            "content-type": "application/json",
        }
        payload = {
            "model": model,
            "max_tokens": 32000,
            "system": [
                {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": system_prompt,
                    "cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"},
                }
            ],
            "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": user_prompt}],
        }
        async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=self._timeout) as client:
            response = await client.post(self._base_url, headers=headers, json=payload)
            response.raise_for_status()
        data = response.json()
        return "".join(
            block.get("text", "")
            for block in data.get("content", [])
            if isinstance(block, Mapping) and block.get("type") == "text"
        )


class GeminiClient:
    """Minimal Gemini generateContent client used behind the LLMClient protocol."""

    def __init__(
        self,
        *,
        api_key: str,
        timeout: float = 60.0,
        base_url: str = "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models",
    ) -> None:
        self._api_key = api_key
        self._timeout = timeout

# Classifier prompt — property-de

You are a routing assistant for a German WEG (Wohnungseigentümergemeinschaft)
property management context engine. Given one envelope (source, kind, content
type, payload) decide which extractor should run.

Allowed extractor names:

- `stammdaten` — structured master-data JSON.
- `bank-csv` — semicolon CSV bank statement.
- `camt053` — CAMT.053 XML bank statement.
- `email` — RFC822 email message body.
- `invoice` — invoice PDF or extracted invoice text.
- `letter` — postal letter PDF or extracted text.
- `booking` — booking JSON from third-party platform (Arbio, etc.).

Return one of the allowed names verbatim. If no extractor fits, return
`unsupported` and the engine will emit a gap signal.

from __future__ import annotations

from collections.abc import Mapping
from importlib.resources import files

from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field, JsonValue

from app.extract.models import (
    ExtractionResult,
    Fact,
    FactStatus,
    GapSignal,
    Payload,
    SourceCitation,
)
from app.ingest.envelope import Envelope, Identifier, validate_identifier
from app.llm.client import LLMClient, parse_json_response

PROMPT_PACKAGE = "app.verticals.property_de.context.prompts"
SCHEMA_PACKAGE = "app.verticals.property_de.context"


def load_prompt(name: str) -> str:
    return files(PROMPT_PACKAGE).joinpath(f"{name}.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8")


def load_context_doc(name: str) -> str:
    return files(SCHEMA_PACKAGE).joinpath(name).read_text(encoding="utf-8")


class _LLMFact(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(extra="allow")

    section: Identifier
    key: Identifier
    value: JsonValue
    locator: str | None = None
    confidence: float = Field(ge=0.0, le=1.0, default=0.7)


class _LLMGap(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(extra="allow")

    section: Identifier
    kind: str = "low_confidence"
    message: str = ""


class _LLMResponse(BaseModel):
    model_config = ConfigDict(extra="forbid")

    facts: list[_LLMFact] = Field(default_factory=list)
    gap_signals: list[_LLMGap] = Field(default_factory=list)


class LLMExtractor:
    """Generic envelope → ExtractionResult adapter backed by an LLM prompt."""

    def __init__(
        self,
        *,
        name: Identifier,
        prompt_name: str,
        client: LLMClient,
        model: str | None = None,
        context_documents: tuple[str, ...] = ("WIKI_SCHEMA.md", "LEGAL_MAP.md"),
    ) -> None:
        self.name = validate_identifier(name)
        self._prompt_name = prompt_name
        self._client = client
        self._model = model
        self._context_documents = context_documents

    async def extract(self, envelope: Envelope, payload: Payload) -> ExtractionResult:
        text = _payload_to_text(payload)
        system_prompt = self._build_system_prompt()
        user_prompt = self._build_user_prompt(envelope, text)
        try:
            raw = await self._client.complete(
                system_prompt=system_prompt,
                user_prompt=user_prompt,
                model=self._model,
            )
            response = _LLMResponse.model_validate(parse_json_response(raw))
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
            return ExtractionResult(
                gap_signals=[
                    GapSignal(
                        property_id=envelope.property,
                        section="property",
                        kind="unsupported",
                        message=f"llm extractor {self.name} failed: {exc}",
                        source_id=envelope.source,
                    )
                ]
            )

        facts = [_to_fact(envelope, item) for item in response.facts]
        signals = [_to_gap_signal(envelope, item) for item in response.gap_signals]
        return ExtractionResult(facts=facts, gap_signals=signals)

    def _build_system_prompt(self) -> str:
        parts = [load_prompt(self._prompt_name)]
        for doc in self._context_documents:
            parts.append(f"\n# Reference: {doc}\n\n{load_context_doc(doc)}")
        return "\n".join(parts)

    def _build_user_prompt(self, envelope: Envelope, text: str) -> str:
        envelope_block = envelope.model_dump_json(exclude_none=True)
        return (
            "Envelope (JSON):\n"
            f"{envelope_block}\n\n"
            "Payload:\n"
            f"{text}\n\n"
            "Return only valid JSON matching the documented schema."
        )


def _payload_to_text(payload: Payload) -> str:
    if isinstance(payload, str):
        return payload
    if isinstance(payload, (bytes, bytearray)):
        return bytes(payload).decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    return repr(payload)


def _to_fact(envelope: Envelope, item: _LLMFact) -> Fact:
    return Fact(
        property_id=envelope.property,
        section=item.section,
        key=item.key,
        value=item.value,
        citation=SourceCitation(
            source_id=envelope.source,
            source_kind=envelope.kind,
            source_uri=envelope.payload_uri,
            locator=(item.locator or "")[:512] or None,
            payload_hash=envelope.payload_hash,
            source_timestamp=envelope.received_at,
        ),
        confidence=item.confidence,
        status=FactStatus.PENDING,
    )


def _to_gap_signal(envelope: Envelope, item: _LLMGap) -> GapSignal:
    kind = item.kind if item.kind in {
        "missing",
        "ambiguous",
        "conflict",
        "low_confidence",
        "unsupported",
    } else "low_confidence"
    return GapSignal(
        property_id=envelope.property,
        section=item.section,
        kind=kind,  # type: ignore[arg-type]
        message=(item.message or "(no detail)")[:512],
        source_id=envelope.source,
    )


class DefaultClassifier:
    """Simple rule classifier: returns the envelope kind so dispatch can lookup an extractor."""

    async def classify(self, envelope: Envelope, payload: Payload) -> str:
        del payload
        return envelope.kind


def build_llm_extractors(
    client: LLMClient,
    model: str | None = None,
) -> Mapping[str, LLMExtractor]:
    return {
        "email": LLMExtractor(name="extract-email", prompt_name="email", client=client, model=model),
        "invoice": LLMExtractor(
            name="extract-invoice",
            prompt_name="invoice",
            client=client,
            model=model,
        ),
        "letter": LLMExtractor(
            name="extract-letter",
            prompt_name="letter",
            client=client,
            model=model,
        ),
        "booking": LLMExtractor(
            name="extract-booking",
            prompt_name="booking",
            client=client,
            model=model,
        ),
    }

        facts = [_to_fact(envelope, item) for item in response.facts]
        signals = [_to_gap_signal(envelope, item) for item in response.gap_signals]
        return ExtractionResult(facts=facts, gap_signals=signals)

    def _build_system_prompt(self) -> str:
        parts = [load_prompt(self._prompt_name)]
        for doc in self._context_documents:
            parts.append(f"\n# Reference: {doc}\n\n{load_context_doc(doc)}")
        return "\n".join(parts)

    def _build_user_prompt(self, envelope: Envelope, text: str) -> str:
        envelope_block = envelope.model_dump_json(exclude_none=True)
        return (
            "Envelope (JSON):\n"
            f"{envelope_block}\n\n"
            "Payload:\n"
            f"{text}\n\n"
            "Return only valid JSON matching the documented schema."
        )


def _payload_to_text(payload: Payload) -> str:
    if isinstance(payload, str):
        return payload
    if isinstance(payload, (bytes, bytearray)):
        return bytes(payload).decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
    return repr(payload)


def _to_fact(envelope: Envelope, item: _LLMFact) -> Fact:
    return Fact(
        property_id=envelope.property,
        section=item.section,
        key=item.key,
        value=item.value,
        citation=SourceCitation(
            source_id=envelope.source,
            source_kind=envelope.kind,
            source_uri=envelope.payload_uri,
            locator=(item.locator or "")[:512] or None,
            payload_hash=envelope.payload_hash,
            source_timestamp=envelope.received_at,
        ),
        confidence=item.confidence,
        status=FactStatus.PENDING,
    )


def _to_gap_signal(envelope: Envelope, item: _LLMGap) -> GapSignal:
    kind = item.kind if item.kind in {
        "missing",
        "ambiguous",
        "conflict",
        "low_confidence",
        "unsupported",
    } else "low_confidence"
    return GapSignal(
        property_id=envelope.property,
        section=item.section,
        kind=kind,  # type: ignore[arg-type]
        message=(item.message or "(no detail)")[:512],
        source_id=envelope.source,
    )


class DefaultClassifier:
    """Simple rule classifier: returns the envelope kind so dispatch can lookup an extractor."""

    async def classify(self, envelope: Envelope, payload: Payload) -> str:
        del payload
        return envelope.kind


def build_llm_extractors(
    client: LLMClient,
    model: str | None = None,
) -> Mapping[str, LLMExtractor]:
    return {
        "email": LLMExtractor(name="extract-email", prompt_name="email", client=client, model=model),
        "invoice": LLMExtractor(
            name="extract-invoice",
            prompt_name="invoice",
            client=client,
            model=model,
        ),
        "letter": LLMExtractor(
            name="extract-letter",
            prompt_name="letter",
            client=client,
            model=model,
        ),
        "booking": LLMExtractor(
            name="extract-booking",
            prompt_name="booking",
            client=client,
            model=model,
        ),
    }

content.subject: Build stammdaten deterministic skill
content.description: parse data/stammdaten/stammdaten.json into ExtractionResult facts. Fresh build, do NOT port 424-line app/storage/stammdaten.py.

content.subject: Build bank/CAMT deterministic skill
content.description: parse CAMT.053 XML + bank CSV into transaction facts.

content.subject: Vertical observers for vocab_gap + legal_gap
content.description: emit gap events when extracted facts use unknown vocab or hit legal-map-relevant sections.

content.subject: Classifier + LLM extractor prompts/examples

content.description: app/mcp/orgs.py becomes engine indirection that reads from active vertical plugin's auth_allowlist.

content.subject: Wire ingest to use vertical plugin
content.description: load active plugin in app factory; ingest endpoint uses plugin.classifier + extractors instead of _default_fact when applicable.

def build_plugin(
    llm_client: LLMClient | None = None,
    llm_model: str | None = None,
) -> VerticalPlugin:
    skills = SkillRegistry()
    skills.register(
        name=STAMMDATEN_SKILL,
        skill=parse_stammdaten,
        adapter_type="extractor",
        input_model=StammdatenInput,
        output_model=ExtractionResult,
    )
    skills.register(
        name=BANK_CSV_SKILL,
        skill=parse_bank_csv,
        adapter_type="extractor",
        input_model=BankCsvInput,
        output_model=ExtractionResult,
    )
    skills.register(
        name=CAMT_SKILL,
        skill=parse_camt053,
        adapter_type="extractor",
        input_model=CamtInput,
        output_model=ExtractionResult,
    )
    client = llm_client or StaticLLMClient()
    extractors = {
        "stammdaten": StammdatenExtractor(),
        "bank-csv": BankCsvExtractor(),
        "camt053": CamtExtractor(),
        **build_llm_extractors(client, model=llm_model),
    }
    return VerticalPlugin(
        name=PLUGIN_NAME,
        classifier=DefaultClassifier(),
        extractors=extractors,
        skills=skills,
        render_template=_read_render_template(),
        observers=build_observers(),
        auth_allowlist=ALLOWLIST,
    )

from __future__ import annotations

from importlib.resources import files
from pathlib import Path

from app.extract.models import ExtractionResult
from app.llm.client import LLMClient, StaticLLMClient
from app.plugin import VerticalPlugin
from app.skills.base import SkillRegistry
from app.verticals.property_de.extractors import DefaultClassifier, build_llm_extractors
from app.verticals.property_de.observers import build_observers
from app.verticals.property_de.orgs import ALLOWLIST
from app.verticals.property_de.skills.bank import (
    CAMT_SKILL_NAME as CAMT_SKILL,
)
from app.verticals.property_de.skills.bank import (
    CSV_SKILL_NAME as BANK_CSV_SKILL,
)
from app.verticals.property_de.skills.bank import (
    BankCsvExtractor,
    BankCsvInput,
    CamtExtractor,
    CamtInput,
    parse_bank_csv,
    parse_camt053,
)
from app.verticals.property_de.skills.stammdaten import (
    SKILL_NAME as STAMMDATEN_SKILL,
)
from app.verticals.property_de.skills.stammdaten import (
    StammdatenExtractor,
    StammdatenInput,
    parse_stammdaten,
)

PLUGIN_NAME = "property-de"
CONTEXT_DIR = "context"
RENDER_TEMPLATE_FILE = "template.md"


def context_path(name: str) -> Path:
    return Path(str(files("app.verticals.property_de").joinpath(CONTEXT_DIR, name)))


def _read_render_template() -> str:
    template = Path(str(files("app.verticals.property_de").joinpath(RENDER_TEMPLATE_FILE)))
    if not template.is_file():
        return ""
    return template.read_text(encoding="utf-8")


def build_plugin() -> VerticalPlugin:
    skills = SkillRegistry()
    skills.register(
        name=STAMMDATEN_SKILL,
        skill=parse_stammdaten,
        adapter_type="extractor",
        input_model=StammdatenInput,
        output_model=ExtractionResult,
    )
    skills.register(
        name=BANK_CSV_SKILL,
        skill=parse_bank_csv,
        adapter_type="extractor",
        input_model=BankCsvInput,
        output_model=ExtractionResult,
    )
    skills.register(
        name=CAMT_SKILL,
        skill=parse_camt053,
        adapter_type="extractor",
        input_model=CamtInput,
        output_model=ExtractionResult,
    )
    return VerticalPlugin(
        name=PLUGIN_NAME,
        extractors={
            "stammdaten": StammdatenExtractor(),
            "bank-csv": BankCsvExtractor(),
            "camt053": CamtExtractor(),
        },
        skills=skills,
        render_template=_read_render_template(),
        observers=build_observers(),
        auth_allowlist=ALLOWLIST,
    )
